Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(************************************************************************************

 The product of double categories

 In this file, we define the product of double categories. Given double categories
 `D₁` and `D₂`, the product of `D₁` and `D₂` is defined as follows:
 - Objects: pairs of objects in `D₁` and `D₂`
 - Vertical morphisms: pairs of vertical morphisms in `D₁` and `D₂`
 - Horizontal morphisms: pairs of horizontal morphisms in `D₁` and `D₂`
 - Squares: pairs of squares in `D₁` and `D₂`
 The operations are defined coordinate-wise.

 We also verify the universal property of products. More specifically, the product
 of double categories is the product in the bicategory of double categories.

 Contents
 1. Horizontal identity and composition
 2. Unitors and associator
 3. The triangle and pentagon
 4. The product of double categories
 5. Projections
 6. Pairing
 7. Pairing of double transformations
 8. Products of double categories

 ************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.TwoSidedDispCat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.DisplayedFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.DisplayedNatTrans.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Examples.ProdOfTwosidedDispCat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfUnivCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Limits.Products.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Basics.DoubleCategoryBasics.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.DoubleCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.UnivalentDoubleCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.DoubleFunctor.Basics.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.DoubleTransformation.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.BicatOfDoubleCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.InvertiblesAndEquivalences.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.DerivedLaws.TransportLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.DerivedLaws.Variations.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope double_cat.

Section ProdOfDoubleCat.
  Context (D₁ D₂ : double_cat).

  (** * 1. Horizontal identity and composition *)
  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_id_data
  (twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂))

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_id_data
  (twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂))

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
∏ x : category_binproduct D₁ D₂,
twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂) x
  x
D₁, D₂: double_cat
∏ (x y : category_binproduct D₁ D₂)
(f : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
?I x -->[ f ][ f] ?I y

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
∏ x : category_binproduct D₁ D₂,
twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂) x
  x
 exact (λ wx, identity_h (pr1 wx) ,, identity_h (pr2 wx)).
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
∏ (x y : category_binproduct D₁ D₂)
(f : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧),
(λ wx : category_binproduct D₁ D₂,
 identity_h (pr1 wx),, identity_h (pr2 wx)) x -->[ f
][ f] (λ wx : category_binproduct D₁ D₂,
       identity_h (pr1 wx),, identity_h (pr2 wx)) y
 exact (λ wx yz fg, id_h_square (pr1 fg) ,, id_h_square (pr2 fg)).
  Defined.

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_id_laws prod_double_cat_hor_id_data

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_id_laws prod_double_cat_hor_id_data

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
∏ x : category_binproduct D₁ D₂,
double_id_mor prod_double_cat_hor_id_data (id₁ x) =
id_two_disp (double_id prod_double_cat_hor_id_data x)
D₁, D₂: double_cat
∏ (x y z : category_binproduct D₁ D₂)
(f : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
double_id_mor prod_double_cat_hor_id_data (f · g) =
double_id_mor prod_double_cat_hor_id_data f ;;2 double_id_mor
                                                 prod_double_cat_hor_id_data
                                                 g

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
∏ x : category_binproduct D₁ D₂,
double_id_mor prod_double_cat_hor_id_data (id₁ x) =
id_two_disp (double_id prod_double_cat_hor_id_data x)
 
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
double_id_mor prod_double_cat_hor_id_data (id₁ x) =
id_two_disp (double_id prod_double_cat_hor_id_data x)

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
id_h_square (id₁ (pr1 x)) =
id_two_disp (identity_h (pr1 x))
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
id_h_square (id₁ (pr2 x)) =
id_two_disp (identity_h (pr2 x))

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
id_h_square (id₁ (pr1 x)) =
id_two_disp (identity_h (pr1 x))
 apply id_h_square_id.
      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
id_h_square (id₁ (pr2 x)) =
id_two_disp (identity_h (pr2 x))
 apply id_h_square_id.
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
∏ (x y z : category_binproduct D₁ D₂)
(f : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧)
(g : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧),
double_id_mor prod_double_cat_hor_id_data (f · g) =
double_id_mor prod_double_cat_hor_id_data f ;;2 double_id_mor
                                                 prod_double_cat_hor_id_data
                                                 g
 
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
f: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
double_id_mor prod_double_cat_hor_id_data (f · g) =
double_id_mor prod_double_cat_hor_id_data f ;;2 double_id_mor
                                                 prod_double_cat_hor_id_data
                                                 g

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
f: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
id_h_square (pr1 f · pr1 g) =
id_h_square (pr1 f) ;;2 id_h_square (pr1 g)
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
f: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
id_h_square (pr2 f · pr2 g) =
id_h_square (pr2 f) ;;2 id_h_square (pr2 g)

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
f: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
id_h_square (pr1 f · pr1 g) =
id_h_square (pr1 f) ;;2 id_h_square (pr1 g)
 apply id_h_square_comp.
      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
f: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y, z ⟧
id_h_square (pr2 f · pr2 g) =
id_h_square (pr2 f) ;;2 id_h_square (pr2 g)
 apply id_h_square_comp.
  Qed.

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_id
  (twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂))

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_id
  (twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂))

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_id_data
  (twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂))
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_id_laws ?I

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_id_data
  (twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂))
 exact prod_double_cat_hor_id_data.
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_id_laws prod_double_cat_hor_id_data
 exact prod_double_cat_hor_id_laws.
  Defined.

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_comp_data
  (twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂))

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_comp_data
  (twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂))

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
∏ x y z : category_binproduct D₁ D₂,
twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂) x
  y
→ twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂)
    y z
  → twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
      (hor_mor D₂) x z
D₁, D₂: double_cat
∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : category_binproduct D₁ D₂)
(v₁ : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(v₂ : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(v₃ : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(h₁ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁)
(h₂ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁)
(k₁ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂)
(k₂ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂),
h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
→ h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
  → ?Cm x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ h₂ -->[ v₁
    ][ v₃] ?Cm x₂ y₂ z₂ k₁ k₂

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
∏ x y z : category_binproduct D₁ D₂,
twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂) x
  y
→ twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂)
    y z
  → twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
      (hor_mor D₂) x z
 exact (λ xy₁ xy₂ xy₃ fg hk, pr1 fg ·h pr1 hk ,, pr2 fg ·h pr2 hk).
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : category_binproduct D₁ D₂)
(v₁ : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(v₂ : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(v₃ : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(h₁ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁)
(h₂ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁)
(k₁ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂)
(k₂ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂),
h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
→ h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
  → (λ (xy₁ xy₂ xy₃ : category_binproduct D₁ D₂)
     (fg : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
             (hor_mor D₂) xy₁ xy₂)
     (hk : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
             (hor_mor D₂) xy₂ xy₃),
     (pr1 fg ·h pr1 hk),, pr2 fg ·h pr2 hk) x₁ y₁ z₁
      h₁ h₂ -->[ v₁
    ][ v₃] (λ (xy₁ xy₂
               xy₃ : category_binproduct D₁ D₂)
            (fg : twosided_disp_cat_product
                    (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂) xy₁ xy₂)
            (hk : twosided_disp_cat_product
                    (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂) xy₂ xy₃),
            (pr1 fg ·h pr1 hk),, pr2 fg ·h pr2 hk) x₂
             y₂ z₂ k₁ k₂
 exact (λ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ v₁ v₂ v₃ h₁ h₂ k₁ k₂ s₁ s₂,
             comp_h_square (pr1 s₁) (pr1 s₂)
             ,,
             comp_h_square (pr2 s₁) (pr2 s₂)).
  Defined.

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_comp_laws prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_comp_laws prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
∏ (x y z : category_binproduct D₁ D₂)
(h₁ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) x y)
(h₂ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) y z),
double_hor_comp_mor prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data
  (id_two_disp h₁) (id_two_disp h₂) =
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data h₁ h₂)
D₁, D₂: double_cat
∏
(x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂ y₃ z₁ z₂
 z₃ : category_binproduct D₁ D₂)
(v₁ : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(v₁' : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧)
(v₂ : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(v₂' : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧)
(v₃ : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(v₃' : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧)
(h₁ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁)
(h₂ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁)
(k₁ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂)
(k₂ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂)
(l₁ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) x₃ y₃)
(l₂ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) y₃ z₃)
(s₁ : h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁)
(s₁' : k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁)
(s₂ : h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂)
(s₂' : k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂),
double_hor_comp_mor prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data
  (s₁ ;;2 s₁') (s₂ ;;2 s₂') =
double_hor_comp_mor prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data s₁
  s₂ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
           prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data s₁' s₂'

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
∏ (x y z : category_binproduct D₁ D₂)
(h₁ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) x y)
(h₂ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) y z),
double_hor_comp_mor prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data
  (id_two_disp h₁) (id_two_disp h₂) =
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data h₁ h₂)
 
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
double_hor_comp_mor prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data
  (id_two_disp h₁) (id_two_disp h₂) =
id_two_disp
  (double_hor_comp prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data h₁ h₂)

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
id_two_disp (pr1 h₁) ⋆h id_two_disp (pr1 h₂) =
id_two_disp (pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂)
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
id_two_disp (pr2 h₁) ⋆h id_two_disp (pr2 h₂) =
id_two_disp (pr2 h₁ ·h pr2 h₂)

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
id_two_disp (pr1 h₁) ⋆h id_two_disp (pr1 h₂) =
id_two_disp (pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂)
 apply comp_h_square_id.
      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
id_two_disp (pr2 h₁) ⋆h id_two_disp (pr2 h₂) =
id_two_disp (pr2 h₁ ·h pr2 h₂)
 apply comp_h_square_id.
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
∏
(x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂ y₃ z₁ z₂
 z₃ : category_binproduct D₁ D₂)
(v₁ : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(v₁' : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧)
(v₂ : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(v₂' : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧)
(v₃ : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(v₃' : category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧)
(h₁ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁)
(h₂ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁)
(k₁ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂)
(k₂ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂)
(l₁ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) x₃ y₃)
(l₂ : twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
        (hor_mor D₂) y₃ z₃)
(s₁ : h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁)
(s₁' : k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁)
(s₂ : h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂)
(s₂' : k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂),
double_hor_comp_mor prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data
  (s₁ ;;2 s₁') (s₂ ;;2 s₂') =
double_hor_comp_mor prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data s₁
  s₂ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
           prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data s₁' s₂'
 
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂
l₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₃ y₃
l₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₃ z₃
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
s₁': k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁
s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
double_hor_comp_mor prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data
  (s₁ ;;2 s₁') (s₂ ;;2 s₂') =
double_hor_comp_mor prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data s₁
  s₂ ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
           prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data s₁' s₂'

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂
l₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₃ y₃
l₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₃ z₃
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
s₁': k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁
s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
(pr1 s₁ ;;2 pr1 s₁') ⋆h (pr1 s₂ ;;2 pr1 s₂') =
pr1 s₁ ⋆h pr1 s₂ ;;2 pr1 s₁' ⋆h pr1 s₂'
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂
l₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₃ y₃
l₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₃ z₃
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
s₁': k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁
s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
(pr2 s₁ ;;2 pr2 s₁') ⋆h (pr2 s₂ ;;2 pr2 s₂') =
pr2 s₁ ⋆h pr2 s₂ ;;2 pr2 s₁' ⋆h pr2 s₂'

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂
l₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₃ y₃
l₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₃ z₃
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
s₁': k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁
s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
(pr1 s₁ ;;2 pr1 s₁') ⋆h (pr1 s₂ ;;2 pr1 s₂') =
pr1 s₁ ⋆h pr1 s₂ ;;2 pr1 s₁' ⋆h pr1 s₂'
 apply comp_h_square_comp.
      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂
l₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₃ y₃
l₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₃ z₃
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] k₁
s₁': k₁ -->[ v₁' ][ v₂'] l₁
s₂: h₂ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
s₂': k₂ -->[ v₂' ][ v₃'] l₂
(pr2 s₁ ;;2 pr2 s₁') ⋆h (pr2 s₂ ;;2 pr2 s₂') =
pr2 s₁ ⋆h pr2 s₂ ;;2 pr2 s₁' ⋆h pr2 s₂'
 apply comp_h_square_comp.
  Qed.

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_comp
  (twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂))

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_comp
  (twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂))

hor_comp_data
  (twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂))
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_comp_laws ?Cm

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_comp_data
  (twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂))
 exact prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data.
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_comp_laws prod_double_cat_hor_comp_data
 exact prod_double_cat_hor_comp_laws.
  Defined.

  (** * 2. Unitors and associator *)
  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_lunitor_data prod_double_cat_hor_id
  prod_double_cat_hor_comp

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_lunitor_data prod_double_cat_hor_id
  prod_double_cat_hor_comp

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
(λ fg : double_hor_comp prod_double_cat_hor_comp
          (double_id prod_double_cat_hor_id x) h -->[
        identity_z_iso x ][ identity_z_iso y] h,
 is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
   (pr2 (identity_z_iso y)) fg)
  (lunitor_h (pr1 h),, lunitor_h (pr2 h))

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
is_iso_twosided_disp (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 y)) (lunitor_h (pr1 h))
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
is_iso_twosided_disp (identity_is_z_iso (pr2 x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr2 y)) (lunitor_h (pr2 h))

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
is_iso_twosided_disp (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 y)) (lunitor_h (pr1 h))
 
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
lunitor_h (pr1 h) ;;2 linvunitor_h (pr1 h) =
trb₂ id_two_disp
       (pr1
          (double_hor_comp prod_double_cat_hor_comp
             (double_id prod_double_cat_hor_id x) h))
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
linvunitor_h (pr1 h) ;;2 lunitor_h (pr1 h) =
trb₂ id_two_disp (pr1 h)

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
lunitor_h (pr1 h) ;;2 linvunitor_h (pr1 h) =
trb₂ id_two_disp
       (pr1
          (double_hor_comp prod_double_cat_hor_comp
             (double_id prod_double_cat_hor_id x) h))
 apply lunitor_linvunitor_h.
      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
linvunitor_h (pr1 h) ;;2 lunitor_h (pr1 h) =
trb₂ id_two_disp (pr1 h)
 apply linvunitor_lunitor_h.
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
is_iso_twosided_disp (identity_is_z_iso (pr2 x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr2 y)) (lunitor_h (pr2 h))

x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂

D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
linvunitor_h (pr2 h) ;;2 lunitor_h (pr2 h) =

D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_lunitor_laws prod_double_cat_lunitor_data

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_lunitor_laws prod_double_cat_lunitor_data

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (lunitor_h (pr1 h₁) ;;2 pr1 τ,,
      lunitor_h (pr2 h₁) ;;2 pr2 τ) =
id_h_square (pr1 v₁) ⋆h pr1 τ ;;2 lunitor_h (pr1 h₂),,
id_h_square (pr2 v₁) ⋆h pr2 τ ;;2 lunitor_h (pr2 h₂)

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ pr1
       (lunitor_h (pr1 h₁) ;;2 pr1 τ,,
        lunitor_h (pr2 h₁) ;;2 pr2 τ),,
trb₂ pr2
       (lunitor_h (pr1 h₁) ;;2 pr1 τ,,
        lunitor_h (pr2 h₁) ;;2 pr2 τ) =
id_h_square (pr1 v₁) ⋆h pr1 τ ;;2 lunitor_h (pr1 h₂),,
id_h_square (pr2 v₁) ⋆h pr2 τ ;;2 lunitor_h (pr2 h₂)

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (lunitor_h (pr1 h₁) ;;2 pr1 τ) =
id_h_square (pr1 v₁) ⋆h pr1 τ ;;2 lunitor_h (pr1 h₂)
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (lunitor_h (pr2 h₁) ;;2 pr2 τ) =
id_h_square (pr2 v₁) ⋆h pr2 τ ;;2 lunitor_h (pr2 h₂)

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (lunitor_h (pr1 h₁) ;;2 pr1 τ) =
id_h_square (pr1 v₁) ⋆h pr1 τ ;;2 lunitor_h (pr1 h₂)
 
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (lunitor_h (pr1 h₁) ;;2 pr1 τ) =
transportb_square
  (id_v_right (pr1 v₁) @ ! id_v_left (pr1 v₁))
  (id_v_right (pr1 v₂) @ ! id_v_left (pr1 v₂))
  (lunitor_h (pr1 h₁) ⋆v pr1 τ)

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
lunitor_h (pr1 h₁) ;;2 pr1 τ =
lunitor_h (pr1 h₁) ⋆v pr1 τ

      apply idpath.
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (lunitor_h (pr2 h₁) ;;2 pr2 τ) =
id_h_square (pr2 v₁) ⋆h pr2 τ ;;2 lunitor_h (pr2 h₂)
 
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (lunitor_h (pr2 h₁) ;;2 pr2 τ) =
transportb_square
  (id_v_right (pr2 v₁) @ ! id_v_left (pr2 v₁))
  (id_v_right (pr2 v₂) @ ! id_v_left (pr2 v₂))
  (lunitor_h (pr2 h₁) ⋆v pr2 τ)

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
lunitor_h (pr2 h₁) ;;2 pr2 τ =
lunitor_h (pr2 h₁) ⋆v pr2 τ

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

double_runitor_data prod_double_cat_hor_id
  prod_double_cat_hor_comp

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
(λ fg : double_hor_comp prod_double_cat_hor_comp h
          (double_id prod_double_cat_hor_id y) -->[
        identity_z_iso x ][ identity_z_iso y] h,
 is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso x))
   (pr2 (identity_z_iso y)) fg)
  (runitor_h (pr1 h),, runitor_h (pr2 h))

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
is_iso_twosided_disp (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 y)) (runitor_h (pr1 h))
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
is_iso_twosided_disp (identity_is_z_iso (pr2 x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr2 y)) (runitor_h (pr2 h))

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
is_iso_twosided_disp (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 x))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 y)) (runitor_h (pr1 h))
 
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
runitor_h (pr1 h) ;;2 rinvunitor_h (pr1 h) =
trb₂ id_two_disp
       (pr1
          (double_hor_comp prod_double_cat_hor_comp h
             (double_id prod_double_cat_hor_id y)))
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
rinvunitor_h (pr1 h) ;;2 runitor_h (pr1 h) =
trb₂ id_two_disp (pr1 h)

x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂

  (hor_mor D₂) x y
runitor_h (pr1 h) ;;2 rinvunitor_h (pr1 h) =
trb₂ id_two_disp
       (pr1
          (double_hor_comp prod_double_cat_hor_comp h
             (double_id prod_double_cat_hor_id y)))
 apply runitor_rinvunitor_h.

x, y: category_binproduct D₁ D₂

  (hor_mor D₂) x y
rinvunitor_h (pr1 h) ;;2 runitor_h (pr1 h) =
trb₂ id_two_disp (pr1 h)
 apply rinvunitor_runitor_h.

  (hor_mor D₂) x y

D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_runitor_laws prod_double_cat_runitor_data

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_runitor_laws prod_double_cat_runitor_data

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (runitor_h (pr1 h₁) ;;2 pr1 τ,,
      runitor_h (pr2 h₁) ;;2 pr2 τ) =
pr1 τ ⋆h id_h_square (pr1 v₂) ;;2 runitor_h (pr1 h₂),,
pr2 τ ⋆h id_h_square (pr2 v₂) ;;2 runitor_h (pr2 h₂)

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ pr1
       (runitor_h (pr1 h₁) ;;2 pr1 τ,,
        runitor_h (pr2 h₁) ;;2 pr2 τ),,
trb₂ pr2
       (runitor_h (pr1 h₁) ;;2 pr1 τ,,
        runitor_h (pr2 h₁) ;;2 pr2 τ) =
pr1 τ ⋆h id_h_square (pr1 v₂) ;;2 runitor_h (pr1 h₂),,
pr2 τ ⋆h id_h_square (pr2 v₂) ;;2 runitor_h (pr2 h₂)

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (runitor_h (pr1 h₁) ;;2 pr1 τ) =
pr1 τ ⋆h id_h_square (pr1 v₂) ;;2 runitor_h (pr1 h₂)
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (runitor_h (pr2 h₁) ;;2 pr2 τ) =
pr2 τ ⋆h id_h_square (pr2 v₂) ;;2 runitor_h (pr2 h₂)

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (runitor_h (pr1 h₁) ;;2 pr1 τ) =
pr1 τ ⋆h id_h_square (pr1 v₂) ;;2 runitor_h (pr1 h₂)
 
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (runitor_h (pr1 h₁) ;;2 pr1 τ) =
transportb_square
  (id_v_right (pr1 v₁) @ ! id_v_left (pr1 v₁))
  (id_v_right (pr1 v₂) @ ! id_v_left (pr1 v₂))
  (runitor_h (pr1 h₁) ⋆v pr1 τ)

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
runitor_h (pr1 h₁) ;;2 pr1 τ =
runitor_h (pr1 h₁) ⋆v pr1 τ

      apply idpath.
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (runitor_h (pr2 h₁) ;;2 pr2 τ) =
pr2 τ ⋆h id_h_square (pr2 v₂) ;;2 runitor_h (pr2 h₂)
 
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
trb₂ (runitor_h (pr2 h₁) ;;2 pr2 τ) =
transportb_square
  (id_v_right (pr2 v₁) @ ! id_v_left (pr2 v₁))
  (id_v_right (pr2 v₂) @ ! id_v_left (pr2 v₂))
  (runitor_h (pr2 h₁) ⋆v pr2 τ)

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
v₁: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
runitor_h (pr2 h₁) ;;2 pr2 τ =
runitor_h (pr2 h₁) ⋆v pr2 τ

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

D₁, D₂: double_cat
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
f: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
is_iso_twosided_disp (pr2 (identity_z_iso w))
  (pr2 (identity_z_iso z))
  (lassociator_h (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h),,
   lassociator_h (pr2 f) (pr2 g) (pr2 h))

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
f: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
is_iso_twosided_disp (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 w))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 z))
  (lassociator_h (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h))
D₁, D₂: double_cat
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
f: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
is_iso_twosided_disp (identity_is_z_iso (pr2 w))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr2 z))
  (lassociator_h (pr2 f) (pr2 g) (pr2 h))

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
f: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
is_iso_twosided_disp (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 w))
  (identity_is_z_iso (pr1 z))
  (lassociator_h (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h))
 
D₁, D₂: double_cat
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
f: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
lassociator_h (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h) ;;2 rassociator_h
                                            (pr1 f)
                                            (pr1 g)
                                            (pr1 h) =
trb₂ id_two_disp
       (pr1
          (double_hor_comp prod_double_cat_hor_comp f
             (double_hor_comp prod_double_cat_hor_comp
                g h)))
D₁, D₂: double_cat
w, x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
f: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
rassociator_h (pr1 f) (pr1 g) (pr1 h) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                            (pr1 f)
                                            (pr1 g)
                                            (pr1 h) =
trb₂ id_two_disp
       (pr1
          (double_hor_comp prod_double_cat_hor_comp
             (double_hor_comp prod_double_cat_hor_comp
                f g) h))

 apply lassociator_rassociator_h.

D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_associator_laws prod_double_cat_associator_data

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_associator_laws prod_double_cat_associator_data

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂
vw: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ (lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 j₁) (pr1 k₁) ;;2 
      pr1 τ₁ ⋆h pr1 τ₂ ⋆h pr1 τ₃,,
      lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 j₁) (pr2 k₁) ;;2 
      pr2 τ₁ ⋆h pr2 τ₂ ⋆h pr2 τ₃) =
pr1 τ₁ ⋆h (pr1 τ₂ ⋆h pr1 τ₃) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                   (pr1 h₂) (pr1 j₂)
                                   (pr1 k₂),,
pr2 τ₁ ⋆h (pr2 τ₂ ⋆h pr2 τ₃) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                   (pr2 h₂) (pr2 j₂)
                                   (pr2 k₂)

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂
vw: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ pr1
       (lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 j₁) (pr1 k₁) ;;2 
        pr1 τ₁ ⋆h pr1 τ₂ ⋆h pr1 τ₃,,
        lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 j₁) (pr2 k₁) ;;2 
        pr2 τ₁ ⋆h pr2 τ₂ ⋆h pr2 τ₃),,
trb₂ pr2
       (lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 j₁) (pr1 k₁) ;;2 
        pr1 τ₁ ⋆h pr1 τ₂ ⋆h pr1 τ₃,,
        lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 j₁) (pr2 k₁) ;;2 
        pr2 τ₁ ⋆h pr2 τ₂ ⋆h pr2 τ₃) =
pr1 τ₁ ⋆h (pr1 τ₂ ⋆h pr1 τ₃) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                   (pr1 h₂) (pr1 j₂)
                                   (pr1 k₂),,
pr2 τ₁ ⋆h (pr2 τ₂ ⋆h pr2 τ₃) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                   (pr2 h₂) (pr2 j₂)
                                   (pr2 k₂)

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂
vw: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ (lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 j₁) (pr1 k₁) ;;2 
      pr1 τ₁ ⋆h pr1 τ₂ ⋆h pr1 τ₃) =
pr1 τ₁ ⋆h (pr1 τ₂ ⋆h pr1 τ₃) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                   (pr1 h₂) (pr1 j₂)
                                   (pr1 k₂)
D₁, D₂: double_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂
vw: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ (lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 j₁) (pr2 k₁) ;;2 
      pr2 τ₁ ⋆h pr2 τ₂ ⋆h pr2 τ₃) =
pr2 τ₁ ⋆h (pr2 τ₂ ⋆h pr2 τ₃) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                   (pr2 h₂) (pr2 j₂)
                                   (pr2 k₂)

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂
vw: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ (lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 j₁) (pr1 k₁) ;;2 
      pr1 τ₁ ⋆h pr1 τ₂ ⋆h pr1 τ₃) =
pr1 τ₁ ⋆h (pr1 τ₂ ⋆h pr1 τ₃) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                   (pr1 h₂) (pr1 j₂)
                                   (pr1 k₂)
 
D₁, D₂: double_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂
vw: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ (lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 j₁) (pr1 k₁) ;;2 
      pr1 τ₁ ⋆h pr1 τ₂ ⋆h pr1 τ₃) =
transportb_square
  (id_v_right (pr1 vw) @ ! id_v_left (pr1 vw))
  (id_v_right (pr1 vz) @ ! id_v_left (pr1 vz))
  (lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 j₁) (pr1 k₁)
   ⋆v pr1 τ₁ ⋆h pr1 τ₂ ⋆h pr1 τ₃)

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂
vw: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 j₁) (pr1 k₁) ;;2 pr1 τ₁
                                             ⋆h pr1 τ₂
                                             ⋆h pr1 τ₃ =
lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 j₁) (pr1 k₁)
⋆v pr1 τ₁ ⋆h pr1 τ₂ ⋆h pr1 τ₃

      apply idpath.
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂
vw: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ (lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 j₁) (pr2 k₁) ;;2 
      pr2 τ₁ ⋆h pr2 τ₂ ⋆h pr2 τ₃) =
pr2 τ₁ ⋆h (pr2 τ₂ ⋆h pr2 τ₃) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                   (pr2 h₂) (pr2 j₂)
                                   (pr2 k₂)
 
D₁, D₂: double_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂
vw: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
trb₂ (lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 j₁) (pr2 k₁) ;;2 
      pr2 τ₁ ⋆h pr2 τ₂ ⋆h pr2 τ₃) =
transportb_square
  (id_v_right (pr2 vw) @ ! id_v_left (pr2 vw))
  (id_v_right (pr2 vz) @ ! id_v_left (pr2 vz))
  (lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 j₁) (pr2 k₁)
   ⋆v pr2 τ₁ ⋆h pr2 τ₂ ⋆h pr2 τ₃)

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₁ x₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w₂ x₂
j₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₁ y₁
j₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y₂ z₂
vw: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
vx: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
vy: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
vz: category_binproduct D₁ D₂ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ -->[ vw ][ vx] h₂
τ₂: j₁ -->[ vx ][ vy] j₂
τ₃: k₁ -->[ vy ][ vz] k₂
lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 j₁) (pr2 k₁) ;;2 pr2 τ₁
                                             ⋆h pr2 τ₂
                                             ⋆h pr2 τ₃ =
lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 j₁) (pr2 k₁)
⋆v pr2 τ₁ ⋆h pr2 τ₂ ⋆h pr2 τ₃

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_cat_associator prod_double_cat_hor_comp

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_cat_associator prod_double_cat_hor_comp

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_associator_data prod_double_cat_hor_comp
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_associator_laws ?a

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_associator_data prod_double_cat_hor_comp
 exact prod_double_cat_associator_data.
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_associator_laws prod_double_cat_associator_data
 exact prod_double_cat_associator_laws.
  Defined.

  (** * 3. The triangle and pentagon *)
  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
triangle_law prod_double_cat_lunitor
  prod_double_cat_runitor prod_double_cat_associator

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
triangle_law prod_double_cat_lunitor
  prod_double_cat_runitor prod_double_cat_associator

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
lassociator_h (pr1 h) (identity_h (pr1 y)) (pr1 k) ;;2 
runitor_h (pr1 h) ⋆h id_two_disp (pr1 k),,
lassociator_h (pr2 h) (identity_h (pr2 y)) (pr2 k) ;;2 
runitor_h (pr2 h) ⋆h id_two_disp (pr2 k) =
trb₂ (id_two_disp (pr1 h) ⋆h lunitor_h (pr1 k),,
      id_two_disp (pr2 h) ⋆h lunitor_h (pr2 k))

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
lassociator_h (pr1 h) (identity_h (pr1 y)) (pr1 k) ;;2 
runitor_h (pr1 h) ⋆h id_two_disp (pr1 k),,
lassociator_h (pr2 h) (identity_h (pr2 y)) (pr2 k) ;;2 
runitor_h (pr2 h) ⋆h id_two_disp (pr2 k) =
trb₂ pr1
       (id_two_disp (pr1 h) ⋆h lunitor_h (pr1 k),,
        id_two_disp (pr2 h) ⋆h lunitor_h (pr2 k)),,
trb₂ pr2
       (id_two_disp (pr1 h) ⋆h lunitor_h (pr1 k),,
        id_two_disp (pr2 h) ⋆h lunitor_h (pr2 k))

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
lassociator_h (pr1 h) (identity_h (pr1 y)) (pr1 k) ;;2 
runitor_h (pr1 h) ⋆h id_two_disp (pr1 k) =
trb₂ id_two_disp (pr1 h) ⋆h lunitor_h (pr1 k)
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
lassociator_h (pr2 h) (identity_h (pr2 y)) (pr2 k) ;;2 
runitor_h (pr2 h) ⋆h id_two_disp (pr2 k) =
trb₂ id_two_disp (pr2 h) ⋆h lunitor_h (pr2 k)

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
lassociator_h (pr1 h) (identity_h (pr1 y)) (pr1 k) ;;2 
runitor_h (pr1 h) ⋆h id_two_disp (pr1 k) =
trb₂ id_two_disp (pr1 h) ⋆h lunitor_h (pr1 k)
 
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
transportb_square (id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 x)))
  (id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 z)))
  (id_v_square (pr1 h) ⋆h lunitor_h (pr1 k)) =
trb₂ id_two_disp (pr1 h) ⋆h lunitor_h (pr1 k)

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
id_v_square (pr1 h) ⋆h lunitor_h (pr1 k) =
id_two_disp (pr1 h) ⋆h lunitor_h (pr1 k)

      apply idpath.
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
lassociator_h (pr2 h) (identity_h (pr2 y)) (pr2 k) ;;2 
runitor_h (pr2 h) ⋆h id_two_disp (pr2 k) =
trb₂ id_two_disp (pr2 h) ⋆h lunitor_h (pr2 k)
 
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
transportb_square (id_v_left (identity_v (pr2 x)))
  (id_v_left (identity_v (pr2 z)))
  (id_v_square (pr2 h) ⋆h lunitor_h (pr2 k)) =
trb₂ id_two_disp (pr2 h) ⋆h lunitor_h (pr2 k)

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
id_v_square (pr2 h) ⋆h lunitor_h (pr2 k) =
id_two_disp (pr2 h) ⋆h lunitor_h (pr2 k)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
pentagon_law prod_double_cat_associator

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
pentagon_law prod_double_cat_associator

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
v, w, x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) v w
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w x
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h₄: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
trb₂ (lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂)
        (pr1 h₃ ·h pr1 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                 (pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂)
                                 (pr1 h₃) (pr1 h₄),,
      lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂)
        (pr2 h₃ ·h pr2 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                 (pr2 h₁ ·h pr2 h₂)
                                 (pr2 h₃) (pr2 h₄)) =
id_two_disp (pr1 h₁)
⋆h lassociator_h (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃) (pr1 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₂
                                                 ·h 
                                                 pr1
                                                 h₃)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₄) ;;2 
lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃)
⋆h id_two_disp (pr1 h₄),,
id_two_disp (pr2 h₁)
⋆h lassociator_h (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃) (pr2 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                                 (pr2
                                                 h₁)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 h₂
                                                 ·h 
                                                 pr2
                                                 h₃)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 h₄) ;;2 
lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃)
⋆h id_two_disp (pr2 h₄)

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
v, w, x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) v w
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w x
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h₄: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
trb₂ pr1
       (lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂)
          (pr1 h₃ ·h pr1 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                   (pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂)
                                   (pr1 h₃) (pr1 h₄),,
        lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂)
          (pr2 h₃ ·h pr2 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                   (pr2 h₁ ·h pr2 h₂)
                                   (pr2 h₃) (pr2 h₄)),,
trb₂ pr2
       (lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂)
          (pr1 h₃ ·h pr1 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                   (pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂)
                                   (pr1 h₃) (pr1 h₄),,
        lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂)
          (pr2 h₃ ·h pr2 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                   (pr2 h₁ ·h pr2 h₂)
                                   (pr2 h₃) (pr2 h₄)) =
id_two_disp (pr1 h₁)
⋆h lassociator_h (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃) (pr1 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₂
                                                 ·h 
                                                 pr1
                                                 h₃)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₄) ;;2 
lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃)
⋆h id_two_disp (pr1 h₄),,
id_two_disp (pr2 h₁)
⋆h lassociator_h (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃) (pr2 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                                 (pr2
                                                 h₁)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 h₂
                                                 ·h 
                                                 pr2
                                                 h₃)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 h₄) ;;2 
lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃)
⋆h id_two_disp (pr2 h₄)

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
v, w, x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) v w
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w x
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h₄: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
trb₂ (lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂)
        (pr1 h₃ ·h pr1 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                 (pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂)
                                 (pr1 h₃) (pr1 h₄)) =
id_two_disp (pr1 h₁)
⋆h lassociator_h (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃) (pr1 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₂
                                                 ·h 
                                                 pr1
                                                 h₃)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₄) ;;2 
lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃)
⋆h id_two_disp (pr1 h₄)
D₁, D₂: double_cat
v, w, x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) v w
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w x
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h₄: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
trb₂ (lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂)
        (pr2 h₃ ·h pr2 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                 (pr2 h₁ ·h pr2 h₂)
                                 (pr2 h₃) (pr2 h₄)) =
id_two_disp (pr2 h₁)
⋆h lassociator_h (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃) (pr2 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                                 (pr2
                                                 h₁)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 h₂
                                                 ·h 
                                                 pr2
                                                 h₃)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 h₄) ;;2 
lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃)
⋆h id_two_disp (pr2 h₄)

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
v, w, x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) v w
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w x
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h₄: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
trb₂ (lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂)
        (pr1 h₃ ·h pr1 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                 (pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂)
                                 (pr1 h₃) (pr1 h₄)) =
id_two_disp (pr1 h₁)
⋆h lassociator_h (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃) (pr1 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₁)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₂
                                                 ·h 
                                                 pr1
                                                 h₃)
                                                 (pr1
                                                 h₄) ;;2 
lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃)
⋆h id_two_disp (pr1 h₄)
 
D₁, D₂: double_cat
v, w, x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) v w
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w x
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h₄: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
trb₂ (lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂)
        (pr1 h₃ ·h pr1 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                 (pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂)
                                 (pr1 h₃) (pr1 h₄)) =
transportb_square
  (id_right (identity_v (pr1 v) ·v identity_v (pr1 v)))
  (id_right (identity_v (pr1 z) ·v identity_v (pr1 z)))
  (lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃ ·h pr1 h₄)
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃)
        (pr1 h₄))

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
v, w, x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) v w
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w x
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h₄: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃ ·h pr1 h₄) ;;2 
lassociator_h (pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃) (pr1 h₄) =
lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃ ·h pr1 h₄)
⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃) (pr1 h₄)

      apply idpath.
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
v, w, x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) v w
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w x
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h₄: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
trb₂ (lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂)
        (pr2 h₃ ·h pr2 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                 (pr2 h₁ ·h pr2 h₂)
                                 (pr2 h₃) (pr2 h₄)) =
id_two_disp (pr2 h₁)
⋆h lassociator_h (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃) (pr2 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                                 (pr2
                                                 h₁)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 h₂
                                                 ·h 
                                                 pr2
                                                 h₃)
                                                 (pr2
                                                 h₄) ;;2 
lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃)
⋆h id_two_disp (pr2 h₄)
 
D₁, D₂: double_cat
v, w, x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) v w
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w x
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h₄: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
trb₂ (lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂)
        (pr2 h₃ ·h pr2 h₄) ;;2 lassociator_h
                                 (pr2 h₁ ·h pr2 h₂)
                                 (pr2 h₃) (pr2 h₄)) =
transportb_square
  (id_right (identity_v (pr2 v) ·v identity_v (pr2 v)))
  (id_right (identity_v (pr2 z) ·v identity_v (pr2 z)))
  (lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃ ·h pr2 h₄)
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁ ·h pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃)
        (pr2 h₄))

      
D₁, D₂: double_cat
v, w, x, y, z: category_binproduct D₁ D₂
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) v w
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) w x
h₃: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) x y
h₄: twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁)
  (hor_mor D₂) y z
lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃ ·h pr2 h₄) ;;2 
lassociator_h (pr2 h₁ ·h pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃) (pr2 h₄) =
lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃ ·h pr2 h₄)
⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁ ·h pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃) (pr2 h₄)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (** * 4. The product of double categories *)
  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_cat

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_cat

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
category
D₁, D₂: double_cat
twosided_disp_cat ?C ?C
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_id ?D
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_comp ?D
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_cat_lunitor ?I ?Cm
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_cat_runitor ?I ?Cm
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_cat_associator ?Cm
D₁, D₂: double_cat
triangle_law ?l ?r ?a
D₁, D₂: double_cat
pentagon_law ?a

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
category
 exact (category_binproduct D₁ D₂).
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
twosided_disp_cat (category_binproduct D₁ D₂)
  (category_binproduct D₁ D₂)
 exact (twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂)).
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_id
  (twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂))
 exact prod_double_cat_hor_id.
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
hor_comp
  (twosided_disp_cat_product (hor_mor D₁) (hor_mor D₂))
 exact prod_double_cat_hor_comp.
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_cat_lunitor prod_double_cat_hor_id
  prod_double_cat_hor_comp
 exact prod_double_cat_lunitor.
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_cat_runitor prod_double_cat_hor_id
  prod_double_cat_hor_comp
 exact prod_double_cat_runitor.
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
double_cat_associator prod_double_cat_hor_comp
 exact prod_double_cat_associator.
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
triangle_law prod_double_cat_lunitor
  prod_double_cat_runitor prod_double_cat_associator
 exact prod_double_cat_triangle.
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
pentagon_law prod_double_cat_associator
 exact prod_double_cat_pentagon.
  Defined.

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
H₁: is_flat_double_cat D₁
H₂: is_flat_double_cat D₂
is_flat_double_cat prod_double_cat

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
H₁: is_flat_double_cat D₁
H₂: is_flat_double_cat D₂
is_flat_double_cat prod_double_cat

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
H₁: is_flat_double_cat D₁
H₂: is_flat_double_cat D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: prod_double_cat
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s₁, s₂: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s₁ = s₂

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
H₁: is_flat_double_cat D₁
H₂: is_flat_double_cat D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: prod_double_cat
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s₁, s₂: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
pr1 s₁ = pr1 s₂
D₁, D₂: double_cat
H₁: is_flat_double_cat D₁
H₂: is_flat_double_cat D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: prod_double_cat
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s₁, s₂: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
pr2 s₁ = pr2 s₂

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
H₁: is_flat_double_cat D₁
H₂: is_flat_double_cat D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: prod_double_cat
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s₁, s₂: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
pr1 s₁ = pr1 s₂
 apply H₁.
    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
H₁: is_flat_double_cat D₁
H₂: is_flat_double_cat D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: prod_double_cat
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s₁, s₂: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
pr2 s₁ = pr2 s₂
 apply H₂.
  Qed.

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: prod_double_cat
v₁, v₁': x₁ -->v y₁
p: v₁ = v₁'
v₂, v₂': x₂ -->v y₂
q: v₂ = v₂'
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
transportf_square p q s =
transportf_square (maponpaths pr1 p)
  (maponpaths pr1 q) (pr1 s),,
transportf_square (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 p)
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 q) (pr2 s)

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: prod_double_cat
v₁, v₁': x₁ -->v y₁
p: v₁ = v₁'
v₂, v₂': x₂ -->v y₂
q: v₂ = v₂'
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
transportf_square p q s =
transportf_square (maponpaths pr1 p)
  (maponpaths pr1 q) (pr1 s),,
transportf_square (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 p)
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 q) (pr2 s)

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: prod_double_cat
v₁: x₁ -->v y₁
v₂: x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
s = pr1 s,, pr2 s

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: prod_double_cat
v₁, v₁': x₁ -->v y₁
p: v₁' = v₁
v₂, v₂': x₂ -->v y₂
q: v₂' = v₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
transportb_square p q s =
transportb_square (maponpaths pr1 p)
  (maponpaths pr1 q) (pr1 s),,
transportb_square (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 p)
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 q) (pr2 s)

  
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: prod_double_cat
v₁, v₁': x₁ -->v y₁
p: v₁' = v₁
v₂, v₂': x₂ -->v y₂
q: v₂' = v₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂
transportb_square p q s =
transportb_square (maponpaths pr1 p)
  (maponpaths pr1 q) (pr1 s),,
transportb_square (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 p)
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 q) (pr2 s)

    
D₁, D₂: double_cat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: prod_double_cat
v₁': x₁ -->v y₁
v₂': x₂ -->v y₂
h₁: x₁ -->h x₂
h₂: y₁ -->h y₂
s: square v₁' v₂' h₁ h₂
s = pr1 s,, pr2 s

    apply idpath.
  Qed.
End ProdOfDoubleCat.


D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
univalent_double_cat

univalent_double_cat

double_cat

 exact (prod_double_cat D₁ D₂).

  (hor_mor (prod_double_cat D₁ D₂))
