 apply is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat_hor_mor.
      
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat (hor_mor D₂)
 apply is_univalent_twosided_disp_cat_hor_mor.
Defined.

Definition make_prod_ob
           {D₁ D₂ : univalent_double_cat}
           (x : D₁)
           (y : D₂)
  : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
  := x ,, y.

Definition make_prod_ver
           {D₁ D₂ : univalent_double_cat}
           {x y : D₁}
           (v : x -->v y)
           {x' y' : D₂}
           (v' : x' -->v y')
  : make_prod_ob x x' -->v make_prod_ob y y'
  := v ,, v'.

Definition make_prod_hor
           {D₁ D₂ : univalent_double_cat}
           {x y : D₁}
           (h : x -->h y)
           {x' y' : D₂}
           (h' : x' -->h y')
  : make_prod_ob x x' -->h make_prod_ob y y'
  := h ,, h'.

Definition make_prod_square
           {D₁ D₂ : univalent_double_cat}
           {x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : D₁}
           {v₁ : x₁ -->v y₁}
           {v₂ : x₂ -->v y₂}
           {h₁ : x₁ -->h x₂}
           {h₂ : y₁ -->h y₂}
           (s : square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂)
           {x₁' x₂' y₁' y₂' : D₂}
           {v₁' : x₁' -->v y₁'}
           {v₂' : x₂' -->v y₂'}
           {h₁' : x₁' -->h x₂'}
           {h₂' : y₁' -->h y₂'}
           (s' : square v₁' v₂' h₁' h₂')
  : square
      (make_prod_ver v₁ v₁') (make_prod_ver v₂ v₂')
      (make_prod_hor h₁ h₁') (make_prod_hor h₂ h₂')
  := s ,, s'.

(** * 5. Projections *)
Section Projections.
  Context (D₁ D₂ : univalent_double_cat).

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂) D₁
  (pr1_functor D₁ D₂)

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂) D₁
  (pr1_functor D₁ D₂)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂,
x -->h y
→ pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x -->h pr1_functor D₁ D₂ y
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
(λ FF : ∏ x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂,
        x -->h y
        → pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x -->h pr1_functor D₁ D₂ y,
 ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
 (h : x₁ -->h y₁) (k : x₂ -->h y₂) (v : x₁ -->v x₂)
 (w : y₁ -->v y₂),
 square v w h k
 → square (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v)
     (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) w) (FF x₁ y₁ h)
     (FF x₂ y₂ k)) ?pr1

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂,
x -->h y
→ pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x -->h pr1_functor D₁ D₂ y
 exact (λ x y f, pr1 f).
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
(λ FF : ∏ x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂,
        x -->h y
        → pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x -->h pr1_functor D₁ D₂ y,
 ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
 (h : x₁ -->h y₁) (k : x₂ -->h y₂) (v : x₁ -->v x₂)
 (w : y₁ -->v y₂),
 square v w h k
 → square (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v)
     (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) w) (FF x₁ y₁ h)
     (FF x₂ y₂ k))
  (λ (x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
   (f : x -->h y), pr1 f)
 exact (λ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ h k f g s, pr1 s).
  Defined.

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_laws
  pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_laws
  pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ (x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(h : x -->h y),
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
  pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data (id_v_square h) =
transportb_square (functor_id (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) x)
  (functor_id (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) y)
  (id_v_square (pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data x y h))
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏
(x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂ y₃ : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(h₁ : x₁ -->h y₁) (h₂ : x₂ -->h y₂) (h₃ : x₃ -->h y₃)
(vx₁ : x₁ -->v x₂) (vy₁ : y₁ -->v y₂)
(s₁ : square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂) (vx₂ : x₂ -->v x₃)
(vy₂ : y₂ -->v y₃) (s₂ : square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃),
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
  pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data (s₁ ⋆v s₂) =
transportb_square
  (functor_comp (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) vx₁ vx₂)
  (functor_comp (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) vy₁ vy₂)
  (twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
     pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data s₁
   ⋆v twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
        pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data s₂)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ (x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(h : x -->h y),
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
  pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data (id_v_square h) =
transportb_square (functor_id (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) x)
  (functor_id (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) y)
  (id_v_square (pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data x y h))
 
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
  pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data (id_v_square h) =
transportb_square (functor_id (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) x)
  (functor_id (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) y)
  (id_v_square (pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data x y h))

      
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
pr1 (id_v_square h) =
transportb_square
  (functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (pr1 h))

      
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
pr1 (id_v_square h) = id_v_square (pr1 h)

      apply idpath.
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏
(x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂ y₃ : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(h₁ : x₁ -->h y₁) (h₂ : x₂ -->h y₂) (h₃ : x₃ -->h y₃)
(vx₁ : x₁ -->v x₂) (vy₁ : y₁ -->v y₂)
(s₁ : square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂) (vx₂ : x₂ -->v x₃)
(vy₂ : y₂ -->v y₃) (s₂ : square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃),
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
  pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data (s₁ ⋆v s₂) =
transportb_square
  (functor_comp (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) vx₁ vx₂)
  (functor_comp (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) vy₁ vy₂)
  (twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
     pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data s₁
   ⋆v twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
        pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data s₂)
 
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: x₁ -->h y₁
h₂: x₂ -->h y₂
h₃: x₃ -->h y₃
vx₁: x₁ -->v x₂
vy₁: y₁ -->v y₂
s₁: square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂
vx₂: x₂ -->v x₃
vy₂: y₂ -->v y₃
s₂: square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
  pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data (s₁ ⋆v s₂) =
transportb_square
  (functor_comp (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) vx₁ vx₂)
  (functor_comp (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) vy₁ vy₂)
  (twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
     pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data s₁
   ⋆v twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
        pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data s₂)

      
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: x₁ -->h y₁
h₂: x₂ -->h y₂
h₃: x₃ -->h y₃
vx₁: x₁ -->v x₂
vy₁: y₁ -->v y₂
s₁: square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂
vx₂: x₂ -->v x₃
vy₂: y₂ -->v y₃
s₂: square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃
pr1 s₁ ;;2 pr1 s₂ =
transportb_square
  (functor_comp
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
     vx₁ vx₂)
  (functor_comp
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
     vy₁ vy₂) (pr1 s₁ ⋆v pr1 s₂)

      
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: x₁ -->h y₁
h₂: x₂ -->h y₂
h₃: x₃ -->h y₃
vx₁: x₁ -->v x₂
vy₁: y₁ -->v y₂
s₁: square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂
vx₂: x₂ -->v x₃
vy₂: y₂ -->v y₃
s₂: square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃
pr1 s₁ ;;2 pr1 s₂ = pr1 s₁ ⋆v pr1 s₂

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
twosided_disp_functor (pr1_functor D₁ D₂)
  (pr1_functor D₁ D₂)
  (hor_mor (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (hor_mor D₁)

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
twosided_disp_functor (pr1_functor D₁ D₂)
  (pr1_functor D₁ D₂)
  (hor_mor (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (hor_mor D₁)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂) D₁
  (pr1_functor D₁ D₂)
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_laws ?FF

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂) D₁
  (pr1_functor D₁ D₂)
 exact pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data.
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_laws
  pr1_twosided_disp_functor_data
 exact pr1_twosided_disp_functor_laws.
  Defined.

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_hor_id pr1_twosided_disp_functor
  (hor_id_double_cat (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (hor_id_double_cat D₁)

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_hor_id pr1_twosided_disp_functor
  (hor_id_double_cat (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (hor_id_double_cat D₁)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ x : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂,
square (identity_v (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x))
  (identity_v (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x))
  (identity_h (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x))
  (pr1_twosided_disp_functor x x (identity_h x))
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ (x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(v : x -->v y),
id_h_square (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v) ⋆v ?FFi y =
transportb_square
  (id_v_right (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v) @
   ! id_v_left (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v))
  (id_v_right (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v) @
   ! id_v_left (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v))
  (?FFi x
   ⋆v (#2 pr1_twosided_disp_functor) (id_h_square v))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ x : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂,
square (identity_v (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x))
  (identity_v (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x))
  (identity_h (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x))
  (pr1_twosided_disp_functor x x (identity_h x))
 exact (λ _, id_v_square _).
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ (x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(v : x -->v y),
id_h_square (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v)
⋆v (λ x0 : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂,
    id_v_square (identity_h (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x0))) y =
transportb_square
  (id_v_right (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v) @
   ! id_v_left (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v))
  (id_v_right (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v) @
   ! id_v_left (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v))
  ((λ x0 : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂,
    id_v_square (identity_h (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x0))) x
   ⋆v (#2 pr1_twosided_disp_functor) (id_h_square v))
 abstract
        (intro ; intros ;
         cbn ;
         rewrite square_id_left_v ;
         rewrite square_id_right_v ;
         rewrite transportb_b_square ;
         use transportb_square_eq ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_hor_comp pr1_twosided_disp_functor
  (hor_comp_double_cat
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (hor_comp_double_cat D₁)

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_hor_comp pr1_twosided_disp_functor
  (hor_comp_double_cat
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (hor_comp_double_cat D₁)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ (x y z : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(h : x -->h y) (k : y -->h z),
square (identity_v (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x))
  (identity_v (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ z))
  (pr1_twosided_disp_functor x y h
   ·h pr1_twosided_disp_functor y z k)
  (pr1_twosided_disp_functor x z (h ·h k))
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏
(x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(v₁ : x₁ -->v x₂) (v₂ : y₁ -->v y₂) (v₃ : z₁ -->v z₂)
(h₁ : x₁ -->h y₁) (h₂ : x₂ -->h y₂) (k₁ : y₁ -->h z₁)
(k₂ : y₂ -->h z₂) (s₁ : square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂)
(s₂ : square v₂ v₃ k₁ k₂),
(#2 pr1_twosided_disp_functor) s₁
⋆h (#2 pr1_twosided_disp_functor) s₂
⋆v ?FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂ =
transportb_square
  (id_v_right (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v₁) @
   ! id_v_left (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v₁))
  (id_v_right (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v₃) @
   ! id_v_left (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v₃))
  (?FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁
   ⋆v (#2 pr1_twosided_disp_functor) (s₁ ⋆h s₂))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ (x y z : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(h : x -->h y) (k : y -->h z),
square (identity_v (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x))
  (identity_v (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ z))
  (pr1_twosided_disp_functor x y h
   ·h pr1_twosided_disp_functor y z k)
  (pr1_twosided_disp_functor x z (h ·h k))
 exact (λ x y z h k, id_v_square (pr1 h ·h pr1 k)).
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏
(x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(v₁ : x₁ -->v x₂) (v₂ : y₁ -->v y₂) (v₃ : z₁ -->v z₂)
(h₁ : x₁ -->h y₁) (h₂ : x₂ -->h y₂) (k₁ : y₁ -->h z₁)
(k₂ : y₂ -->h z₂) (s₁ : square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂)
(s₂ : square v₂ v₃ k₁ k₂),
(#2 pr1_twosided_disp_functor) s₁
⋆h (#2 pr1_twosided_disp_functor) s₂
⋆v (λ (x y z : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
    (h : x -->h y) (k : y -->h z),
    id_v_square (pr1 h ·h pr1 k)) x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂ =
transportb_square
  (id_v_right (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v₁) @
   ! id_v_left (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v₁))
  (id_v_right (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v₃) @
   ! id_v_left (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) v₃))
  ((λ (x y z : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
    (h : x -->h y) (k : y -->h z),
    id_v_square (pr1 h ·h pr1 k)) x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁
   ⋆v (#2 pr1_twosided_disp_functor) (s₁ ⋆h s₂))
 abstract
        (intro ; intros ;
         cbn ;
         rewrite square_id_left_v ;
         rewrite square_id_right_v ;
         rewrite transportb_b_square ;
         use transportb_square_eq ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_lunitor
  (double_cat_double_lunitor
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (double_cat_double_lunitor D₁)
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1_hor_id
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1_hor_comp

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_lunitor
  (double_cat_double_lunitor
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (double_cat_double_lunitor D₁)
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1_hor_id
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1_hor_comp

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ (x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(h : x -->h y),
lunitor_h (pr1_twosided_disp_functor x y h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x))
     (id₁ (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x))
     (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ x)) @
   id_left
     (id₁ (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x)
      · # (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ x)) @
   id_left (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ x)) @
   functor_id (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) x)
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ y))
     (id₁ (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ y))
     (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ y)) @
   id_left
     (id₁ (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ y)
      · # (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ y)) @
   id_left (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ y)) @
   functor_id (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) y)
  (functor_double_id_cell
     prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1_hor_id x
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1_hor_comp
        (double_id
           (hor_id_double_cat
              (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)) x) h
   ⋆v (#2 pr1_twosided_disp_functor) (lunitor_h h))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
lunitor_h (pr1 h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 x))
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h)
   ⋆v id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 x) ·h pr1 h)
   ⋆v lunitor_h (pr1 h))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
lunitor_h (pr1 h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportf_square
     (assoc (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)))
     (assoc (identity_v (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))
        (id₁ (pr1 y)))
     (id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 x))
      ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h)
      ⋆v (id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 x) ·h pr1 h)
          ⋆v lunitor_h (pr1 h))))

x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
lunitor_h (pr1 h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc (identity_v (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))
     (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 x))
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h)
   ⋆v (id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 x) ·h pr1 h)
       ⋆v lunitor_h (pr1 h)))

x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y

  (assoc (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc (identity_v (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))
     (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 x))
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h)
   ⋆v (id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 x) ·h pr1 h)
       ⋆v lunitor_h (pr1 h))) = lunitor_h (pr1 h)

   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h)
   ⋆v (id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 x) ·h pr1 h)
       ⋆v lunitor_h (pr1 h))) = ?b

x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y

D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assoc (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc (identity_v (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))
     (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 x))
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h)
   ⋆v transportb_square (id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)))
        (id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) (lunitor_h (pr1 h))) =
lunitor_h (pr1 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assoc (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc (identity_v (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))
     (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 x))
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h)
   ⋆v transportf_square (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)))
        (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) (lunitor_h (pr1 h))) =
lunitor_h (pr1 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assoc (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc (identity_v (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))
     (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 x -->v pr1 x, id₁ (pr1 x) ·v z)
        (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 x))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 y -->v pr1 y,
         identity_v (pr1 y) ·v z)
        (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))))
     (id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 x))
      ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h) ⋆v lunitor_h (pr1 h))) =
lunitor_h (pr1 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 x -->v pr1 x, id₁ (pr1 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 x))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 y -->v pr1 y, identity_v (pr1 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))
     (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 x))
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h) ⋆v lunitor_h (pr1 h)) =
lunitor_h (pr1 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 x -->v pr1 x, id₁ (pr1 x) ·v z)

  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 y -->v pr1 y, identity_v (pr1 y) ·v z)

     (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_h_square (identity_v (pr1 x))
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h) ⋆v lunitor_h (pr1 h)) =
lunitor_h (pr1 h)

D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 x -->v pr1 x, id₁ (pr1 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 x))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 y -->v pr1 y, identity_v (pr1 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))
     (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportb_square
     (id_v_right (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
      ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr1 x)))
     (id_v_right (identity_v (pr1 y)) @
      ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 y)))
     (lunitor_h (pr1 h) ⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h))) =
lunitor_h (pr1 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 x -->v pr1 x, id₁ (pr1 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 x))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 y -->v pr1 y, identity_v (pr1 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))
     (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportf_square
     (! (id_v_right (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
         ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr1 x))))
     (! (id_v_right (identity_v (pr1 y)) @
         ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 y))))
     (lunitor_h (pr1 h) ⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h))) =
lunitor_h (pr1 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (! (id_v_right (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
      ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr1 x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 x -->v pr1 x, id₁ (pr1 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 x))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (! (id_v_right (identity_v (pr1 y)) @
      ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 y -->v pr1 y, identity_v (pr1 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))
     (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (lunitor_h (pr1 h) ⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h)) =
lunitor_h (pr1 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (! (id_v_right (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
      ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr1 x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 x -->v pr1 x, id₁ (pr1 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 x))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (! (id_v_right (identity_v (pr1 y)) @
      ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 y -->v pr1 y, identity_v (pr1 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))
     (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (lunitor_h (pr1 h) ⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h)) = ?b
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
?b = lunitor_h (pr1 h)

h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (! (id_v_right (id₁ (pr1 x)) @

     (λ z : pr1 x -->v pr1 x, id₁ (pr1 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 x))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (! (id_v_right (identity_v (pr1 y)) @
      ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 y -->v pr1 y, identity_v (pr1 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))
     (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (lunitor_h (pr1 h) ⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h)) = ?b

      
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
lunitor_h (pr1 h) ⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h) = ?t2

      apply (square_id_right_v (C := D₁)).
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (! (id_v_right (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
      ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr1 x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 x -->v pr1 x, id₁ (pr1 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 x))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (! (id_v_right (identity_v (pr1 y)) @
      ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 y -->v pr1 y, identity_v (pr1 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))
     (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportb_square (id_right (identity_v (pr1 x)))
     (id_right (identity_v (pr1 y)))
     (lunitor_h (pr1 h))) = lunitor_h (pr1 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (! (id_v_right (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
      ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr1 x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 x -->v pr1 x, id₁ (pr1 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 x))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (! (id_v_right (identity_v (pr1 y)) @
      ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 y -->v pr1 y, identity_v (pr1 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))
     (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportf_square (! id_right (identity_v (pr1 x)))
     (! id_right (identity_v (pr1 y)))
     (lunitor_h (pr1 h))) = lunitor_h (pr1 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (! id_right (identity_v (pr1 x)) @
   ! (id_v_right (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
      ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr1 x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 x -->v pr1 x, id₁ (pr1 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 x))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (! id_right (identity_v (pr1 y)) @
   ! (id_v_right (identity_v (pr1 y)) @
      ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 y -->v pr1 y, identity_v (pr1 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y))
     (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (lunitor_h (pr1 h)) = lunitor_h (pr1 h)

    apply transportf_square_id.
  Qed.

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_runitor
  (double_cat_double_runitor
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (double_cat_double_runitor D₁)
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1_hor_id
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1_hor_comp

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_runitor
  (double_cat_double_runitor
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (double_cat_double_runitor D₁)
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1_hor_id
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1_hor_comp

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ (x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(h : x -->h y),
runitor_h (pr1_twosided_disp_functor x y h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x))
     (id₁ (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x))
     (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ x)) @
   id_left
     (id₁ (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ x)
      · # (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ x)) @
   id_left (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ x)) @
   functor_id (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) x)
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ y))
     (id₁ (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ y))
     (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ y)) @
   id_left
     (id₁ (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ y)
      · # (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ y)) @
   id_left (# (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ y)) @
   functor_id (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) y)
  (id_v_square (pr1_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
   ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
        prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1_hor_id y
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1_hor_comp h
        (double_id
           (hor_id_double_cat
              (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)) y)
   ⋆v (#2 pr1_twosided_disp_functor) (runitor_h h))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
runitor_h (pr1 h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (pr1 h)
   ⋆h id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 y))
   ⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h ·h identity_h (pr1 y))
   ⋆v runitor_h (pr1 h))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
runitor_h (pr1 h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportf_square
     (assoc (identity_v (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x))
        (id₁ (pr1 x)))
     (assoc (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)))
     (id_v_square (pr1 h)
      ⋆h id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 y))
      ⋆v (id_v_square (pr1 h ·h identity_h (pr1 y))
          ⋆v runitor_h (pr1 h))))

h: x -->h y
runitor_h (pr1 h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc (identity_v (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x))
     (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @

   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (pr1 h)
   ⋆h id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 y))
   ⋆v (id_v_square (pr1 h ·h identity_h (pr1 y))
       ⋆v runitor_h (pr1 h)))

x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assoc (identity_v (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x))
     (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @

  (assoc (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @

  (id_v_square (pr1 h)
   ⋆h id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 y))
   ⋆v (id_v_square (pr1 h ·h identity_h (pr1 y))
       ⋆v runitor_h (pr1 h))) = runitor_h (pr1 h)

   ⋆v (id_v_square (pr1 h ·h identity_h (pr1 y))
       ⋆v runitor_h (pr1 h))) = ?b

   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @

x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
id_v_square (pr1 h ·h identity_h (pr1 y))
⋆v runitor_h (pr1 h) = ?t2

      apply (square_id_left_v (C := D₁)).
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assoc (identity_v (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x))
     (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (pr1 h)
   ⋆h id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 y))
   ⋆v transportb_square (id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)))
        (id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) (runitor_h (pr1 h))) =
runitor_h (pr1 h)

  (assoc (identity_v (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x))

   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @

   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @

   ⋆h id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 y))
   ⋆v transportf_square (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)))
        (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) (runitor_h (pr1 h))) =
runitor_h (pr1 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assoc (identity_v (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x))
     (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 x -->v pr1 x,
         identity_v (pr1 x) ·v z)
        (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 x))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 y -->v pr1 y, id₁ (pr1 y) ·v z)
        (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))))
     (id_v_square (pr1 h)
      ⋆h id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 y))
      ⋆v runitor_h (pr1 h))) = runitor_h (pr1 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat

h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 x -->v pr1 x, identity_v (pr1 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 x))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x))
     (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 y -->v pr1 y, id₁ (pr1 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @

   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (pr1 h)
   ⋆h id_v_square (identity_h (pr1 y))
   ⋆v runitor_h (pr1 h)) = runitor_h (pr1 h)

D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 x -->v pr1 x, identity_v (pr1 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 x))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x))
     (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 y -->v pr1 y, id₁ (pr1 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportb_square
     (id_v_right (identity_v (pr1 x)) @
      ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 x)))
     (id_v_right (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
      ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr1 y)))
     (runitor_h (pr1 h) ⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h))) =
runitor_h (pr1 h)

x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y

  (maponpaths

  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 y -->v pr1 y, id₁ (pr1 y) ·v z)

  (transportf_square
     (! (id_v_right (identity_v (pr1 x)) @
         ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 x))))
     (! (id_v_right (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
         ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr1 y))))
     (runitor_h (pr1 h) ⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h))) =
runitor_h (pr1 h)

     (id_right (identity_v (pr1 y)))

D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (! (id_v_right (identity_v (pr1 x)) @
      ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 x -->v pr1 x, identity_v (pr1 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 x))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x))
     (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @

  (! (id_v_right (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
      ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 y -->v pr1 y, id₁ (pr1 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportf_square (! id_right (identity_v (pr1 x)))
     (! id_right (identity_v (pr1 y)))
     (runitor_h (pr1 h))) = runitor_h (pr1 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (! id_right (identity_v (pr1 x)) @
   ! (id_v_right (identity_v (pr1 x)) @
      ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 x -->v pr1 x, identity_v (pr1 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 x))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x))
     (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x) · id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (! id_right (identity_v (pr1 y)) @
   ! (id_v_right (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
      ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 y -->v pr1 y, id₁ (pr1 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 y))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y) · id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr1 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (runitor_h (pr1 h)) = runitor_h (pr1 h)

    apply transportf_square_id.
  Qed.

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_associator
  (double_cat_double_associator
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (double_cat_double_associator D₁)
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1_hor_comp

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_associator
  (double_cat_double_associator
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (double_cat_double_associator D₁)
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1_hor_comp

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ (w x y z : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(h₁ : w -->h x) (h₂ : x -->h y) (h₃ : y -->h z),
lassociator_h (pr1_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
  (pr1_twosided_disp_functor x y h₂)
  (pr1_twosided_disp_functor y z h₃)
⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
     prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1_hor_comp h₁ h₂
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1_twosided_disp_functor y z h₃)
⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
     prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1_hor_comp (h₁ ·h h₂)
     h₃ =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ w)
         ·v id₁ (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ w)))
     (functor_id (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (id₁ (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ z)
         ·v id₁ (pr1_functor D₁ D₂ z)))
     (functor_id (pr1_functor D₁ D₂) z))
  (id_v_square (pr1_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
   ⋆h functor_double_comp_cell
        prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1_hor_comp h₂ h₃
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1_hor_comp h₁
        (h₂ ·h h₃)
   ⋆v (#2 pr1_twosided_disp_functor)
        (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃)
⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₃)
⋆v id_v_square ((pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂) ·h pr1 h₃) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr1 w) ·v id₁ (pr1 w)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr1 z) ·v id₁ (pr1 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃)
   ⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h₁ ·h (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃)
⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₃)
⋆v id_v_square ((pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂) ·h pr1 h₃) = ?b
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
?b =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr1 w) ·v id₁ (pr1 w)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr1 z) ·v id₁ (pr1 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃)
   ⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h₁ ·h (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃)
⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₃)
⋆v id_v_square ((pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂) ·h pr1 h₃) = ?b

      apply (square_id_right_v (C := D₁)).
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
transportb_square
  (id_right (identity_v (pr1 w) ·v id₁ (pr1 w)))
  (id_right (identity_v (pr1 z) ·v identity_v (pr1 z)))
  (lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃)
   ⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂)
      ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₃)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr1 w) ·v id₁ (pr1 w)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr1 z) ·v id₁ (pr1 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃)
   ⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h₁ ·h (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃))

w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
transportf_square
  (! id_right (identity_v (pr1 w) ·v id₁ (pr1 w)))
  (! id_right
       (identity_v (pr1 z) ·v identity_v (pr1 z)))
  (lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃)
   ⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h₁ ·h pr1 h₂)
      ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₃)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr1 w) ·v id₁ (pr1 w)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr1 z) ·v id₁ (pr1 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃)
   ⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h₁ ·h (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃))

  (! id_right

   ⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h₁) ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₂)

w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x

⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h₁) ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₂)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₃)

D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
transportf_square
  (! id_right (identity_v (pr1 w) ·v id₁ (pr1 w)))
  (! id_right
       (identity_v (pr1 z) ·v identity_v (pr1 z)))
  (transportf_square
     (id_v_right (id₁ (pr1 w)) @
      ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr1 w)))
     (id_v_right (identity_v (pr1 z)) @
      ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 z)))
     (id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
      ⋆h (id_v_square (pr1 h₂) ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₃))
      ⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃))) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr1 w) ·v id₁ (pr1 w)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr1 z) ·v id₁ (pr1 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃)
   ⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h₁ ·h (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃))

w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
transportf_square
  ((id_v_right (id₁ (pr1 w)) @
    ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr1 w))) @
   ! id_right (identity_v (pr1 w) ·v id₁ (pr1 w)))
  ((id_v_right (identity_v (pr1 z)) @
    ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 z))) @
   ! id_right
       (identity_v (pr1 z) ·v identity_v (pr1 z)))
  (id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
   ⋆h (id_v_square (pr1 h₂) ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr1 w) ·v id₁ (pr1 w)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr1 z) ·v id₁ (pr1 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃)
   ⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h₁ ·h (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃))

⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h₁ ·h (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃))
⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃) = ?t2

w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x

⋆v id_v_square (pr1 h₁ ·h (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃)) = ?y'

      apply (square_id_right_v (C := D₁)).
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr1 w) ·v id₁ (pr1 w)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr1 z) ·v id₁ (pr1 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (transportb_square (id_right (identity_v (pr1 w)))
     (id_right (id₁ (pr1 z)))
     (id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
      ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃)) =
transportf_square
  ((id_v_right (id₁ (pr1 w)) @
    ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr1 w))) @
   ! id_right (identity_v (pr1 w) ·v id₁ (pr1 w)))
  ((id_v_right (identity_v (pr1 z)) @
    ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 z))) @
   ! id_right
       (identity_v (pr1 z) ·v identity_v (pr1 z)))
  (id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
   ⋆h (id_v_square (pr1 h₂) ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr1 w) ·v id₁ (pr1 w)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr1 z) ·v id₁ (pr1 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (transportf_square (! id_right (identity_v (pr1 w)))
     (! id_right (id₁ (pr1 z)))
     (id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
      ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃)) =
transportf_square
  ((id_v_right (id₁ (pr1 w)) @
    ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr1 w))) @
   ! id_right (identity_v (pr1 w) ·v id₁ (pr1 w)))
  ((id_v_right (identity_v (pr1 z)) @
    ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 z))) @
   ! id_right
       (identity_v (pr1 z) ·v identity_v (pr1 z)))
  (id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
   ⋆h (id_v_square (pr1 h₂) ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr1 w) ·v id₁ (pr1 w)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr1 z) ·v id₁ (pr1 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr1 w -->v pr1 w, z ·v id₁ (pr1 w))
        (! id_right (identity_v (pr1 w))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ z0 : pr1 z -->v pr1 z, z0 ·v id₁ (pr1 z))
        (! id_right (id₁ (pr1 z))))
     (id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
      ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃)
      ⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃))) =
transportf_square
  ((id_v_right (id₁ (pr1 w)) @
    ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr1 w))) @
   ! id_right (identity_v (pr1 w) ·v id₁ (pr1 w)))
  ((id_v_right (identity_v (pr1 z)) @
    ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 z))) @
   ! id_right
       (identity_v (pr1 z) ·v identity_v (pr1 z)))
  (id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
   ⋆h (id_v_square (pr1 h₂) ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr1 w -->v pr1 w, z ·v id₁ (pr1 w))
     (! id_right (identity_v (pr1 w))) @
   maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr1 w) ·v id₁ (pr1 w)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        w))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr1 z -->v pr1 z, z0 ·v id₁ (pr1 z))
     (! id_right (id₁ (pr1 z))) @
   maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr1 z) ·v id₁ (pr1 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃)
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃)) =
transportf_square
  ((id_v_right (id₁ (pr1 w)) @
    ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr1 w))) @
   ! id_right (identity_v (pr1 w) ·v id₁ (pr1 w)))
  ((id_v_right (identity_v (pr1 z)) @
    ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr1 z))) @
   ! id_right
       (identity_v (pr1 z) ·v identity_v (pr1 z)))
  (id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
   ⋆h (id_v_square (pr1 h₂) ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
id_v_square (pr1 h₁) ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₂ ·h pr1 h₃)
⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃) =
id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
⋆h (id_v_square (pr1 h₂) ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₃))
⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
⋆h (id_v_square (pr1 h₂) ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₃))
⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃) =
id_v_square (pr1 h₁)
⋆h (id_v_square (pr1 h₂) ⋆h id_v_square (pr1 h₃))
⋆v lassociator_h (pr1 h₁) (pr1 h₂) (pr1 h₃)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂,
x -->h y
→ pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x -->h pr2_functor D₁ D₂ y
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
(λ FF : ∏ x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂,
        x -->h y
        → pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x -->h pr2_functor D₁ D₂ y,
 ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
 (h : x₁ -->h y₁) (k : x₂ -->h y₂) (v : x₁ -->v x₂)
 (w : y₁ -->v y₂),
 square v w h k
 → square (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v)
     (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) w) (FF x₁ y₁ h)
     (FF x₂ y₂ k)) ?pr1

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂,
x -->h y
→ pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x -->h pr2_functor D₁ D₂ y
 exact (λ x y f, pr2 f).
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
(λ FF : ∏ x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂,
        x -->h y
        → pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x -->h pr2_functor D₁ D₂ y,
 ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
 (h : x₁ -->h y₁) (k : x₂ -->h y₂) (v : x₁ -->v x₂)
 (w : y₁ -->v y₂),
 square v w h k
 → square (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v)
     (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) w) (FF x₁ y₁ h)
     (FF x₂ y₂ k))
  (λ (x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
   (f : x -->h y), pr2 f)
 exact (λ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ h k f g s, pr2 s).
  Defined.

twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_laws
  pr2_twosided_disp_functor_data

twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_laws
  pr2_twosided_disp_functor_data

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ (x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(h : x -->h y),
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
  pr2_twosided_disp_functor_data (id_v_square h) =
transportb_square (functor_id (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) x)
  (functor_id (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) y)
  (id_v_square (pr2_twosided_disp_functor_data x y h))
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏
(x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂ y₃ : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(h₁ : x₁ -->h y₁) (h₂ : x₂ -->h y₂) (h₃ : x₃ -->h y₃)
(vx₁ : x₁ -->v x₂) (vy₁ : y₁ -->v y₂)
(s₁ : square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂) (vx₂ : x₂ -->v x₃)
(vy₂ : y₂ -->v y₃) (s₂ : square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃),
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
  pr2_twosided_disp_functor_data (s₁ ⋆v s₂) =
transportb_square
  (functor_comp (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) vx₁ vx₂)
  (functor_comp (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) vy₁ vy₂)
  (twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
     pr2_twosided_disp_functor_data s₁
   ⋆v twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
        pr2_twosided_disp_functor_data s₂)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ (x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(h : x -->h y),
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
  pr2_twosided_disp_functor_data (id_v_square h) =
transportb_square (functor_id (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) x)
  (functor_id (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) y)
  (id_v_square (pr2_twosided_disp_functor_data x y h))
 
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
  pr2_twosided_disp_functor_data (id_v_square h) =
transportb_square (functor_id (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) x)
  (functor_id (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) y)
  (id_v_square (pr2_twosided_disp_functor_data x y h))

      
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
pr2 (id_v_square h) =
transportb_square
  (functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (pr2 h))

      
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
pr2 (id_v_square h) = id_v_square (pr2 h)

      apply idpath.
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏
(x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂ y₃ : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(h₁ : x₁ -->h y₁) (h₂ : x₂ -->h y₂) (h₃ : x₃ -->h y₃)
(vx₁ : x₁ -->v x₂) (vy₁ : y₁ -->v y₂)
(s₁ : square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂) (vx₂ : x₂ -->v x₃)
(vy₂ : y₂ -->v y₃) (s₂ : square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃),
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
  pr2_twosided_disp_functor_data (s₁ ⋆v s₂) =
transportb_square
  (functor_comp (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) vx₁ vx₂)
  (functor_comp (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) vy₁ vy₂)
  (twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
     pr2_twosided_disp_functor_data s₁
   ⋆v twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
        pr2_twosided_disp_functor_data s₂)
 
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: x₁ -->h y₁
h₂: x₂ -->h y₂
h₃: x₃ -->h y₃
vx₁: x₁ -->v x₂
vy₁: y₁ -->v y₂
s₁: square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂
vx₂: x₂ -->v x₃
vy₂: y₂ -->v y₃
s₂: square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
  pr2_twosided_disp_functor_data (s₁ ⋆v s₂) =
transportb_square
  (functor_comp (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) vx₁ vx₂)
  (functor_comp (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) vy₁ vy₂)
  (twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
     pr2_twosided_disp_functor_data s₁
   ⋆v twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
        pr2_twosided_disp_functor_data s₂)

      
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: x₁ -->h y₁
h₂: x₂ -->h y₂
h₃: x₃ -->h y₃
vx₁: x₁ -->v x₂
vy₁: y₁ -->v y₂
s₁: square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂
vx₂: x₂ -->v x₃
vy₂: y₂ -->v y₃
s₂: square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃
pr2 s₁ ;;2 pr2 s₂ =
transportb_square
  (functor_comp
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
     vx₁ vx₂)
  (functor_comp
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
     vy₁ vy₂) (pr2 s₁ ⋆v pr2 s₂)

      
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: x₁ -->h y₁
h₂: x₂ -->h y₂
h₃: x₃ -->h y₃
vx₁: x₁ -->v x₂
vy₁: y₁ -->v y₂
s₁: square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂
vx₂: x₂ -->v x₃
vy₂: y₂ -->v y₃
s₂: square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃
pr2 s₁ ;;2 pr2 s₂ = pr2 s₁ ⋆v pr2 s₂

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
twosided_disp_functor (pr2_functor D₁ D₂)
  (pr2_functor D₁ D₂)
  (hor_mor (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))

twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_laws
  pr2_twosided_disp_functor_data

double_functor_hor_id pr2_twosided_disp_functor
  (hor_id_double_cat (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))

D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_hor_id pr2_twosided_disp_functor
  (hor_id_double_cat (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (hor_id_double_cat D₂)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ x : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂,
square (identity_v (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x))
  (identity_v (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x))
  (identity_h (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x))
  (pr2_twosided_disp_functor x x (identity_h x))
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ (x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(v : x -->v y),
id_h_square (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v) ⋆v ?FFi y =
transportb_square
  (id_v_right (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v) @
   ! id_v_left (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v))
  (id_v_right (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v) @
   ! id_v_left (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v))
  (?FFi x
   ⋆v (#2 pr2_twosided_disp_functor) (id_h_square v))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ x : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂,
square (identity_v (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x))
  (identity_v (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x))
  (identity_h (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x))
  (pr2_twosided_disp_functor x x (identity_h x))
 exact (λ _, id_v_square _).
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ (x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(v : x -->v y),
id_h_square (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v)
⋆v (λ x0 : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂,
    id_v_square (identity_h (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x0))) y =
transportb_square
  (id_v_right (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v) @
   ! id_v_left (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v))
  (id_v_right (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v) @
   ! id_v_left (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v))
  ((λ x0 : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂,
    id_v_square (identity_h (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x0))) x
   ⋆v (#2 pr2_twosided_disp_functor) (id_h_square v))
 abstract
        (intro ; intros ;
         cbn ;
         rewrite square_id_left_v ;
         rewrite square_id_right_v ;
         rewrite transportb_b_square ;
         use transportb_square_eq ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_hor_comp pr2_twosided_disp_functor
  (hor_comp_double_cat
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (hor_comp_double_cat D₂)

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_hor_comp pr2_twosided_disp_functor
  (hor_comp_double_cat
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (hor_comp_double_cat D₂)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ (x y z : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(h : x -->h y) (k : y -->h z),
square (identity_v (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x))
  (identity_v (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ z))
  (pr2_twosided_disp_functor x y h
   ·h pr2_twosided_disp_functor y z k)
  (pr2_twosided_disp_functor x z (h ·h k))
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏
(x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(v₁ : x₁ -->v x₂) (v₂ : y₁ -->v y₂) (v₃ : z₁ -->v z₂)
(h₁ : x₁ -->h y₁) (h₂ : x₂ -->h y₂) (k₁ : y₁ -->h z₁)
(k₂ : y₂ -->h z₂) (s₁ : square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂)
(s₂ : square v₂ v₃ k₁ k₂),
(#2 pr2_twosided_disp_functor) s₁
⋆h (#2 pr2_twosided_disp_functor) s₂
⋆v ?FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂ =
transportb_square
  (id_v_right (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v₁) @
   ! id_v_left (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v₁))
  (id_v_right (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v₃) @
   ! id_v_left (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v₃))
  (?FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁
   ⋆v (#2 pr2_twosided_disp_functor) (s₁ ⋆h s₂))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ (x y z : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(h : x -->h y) (k : y -->h z),
square (identity_v (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x))
  (identity_v (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ z))
  (pr2_twosided_disp_functor x y h
   ·h pr2_twosided_disp_functor y z k)
  (pr2_twosided_disp_functor x z (h ·h k))
 exact (λ x y z h k, id_v_square (pr2 h ·h pr2 k)).
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏
(x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(v₁ : x₁ -->v x₂) (v₂ : y₁ -->v y₂) (v₃ : z₁ -->v z₂)
(h₁ : x₁ -->h y₁) (h₂ : x₂ -->h y₂) (k₁ : y₁ -->h z₁)
(k₂ : y₂ -->h z₂) (s₁ : square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂)
(s₂ : square v₂ v₃ k₁ k₂),
(#2 pr2_twosided_disp_functor) s₁
⋆h (#2 pr2_twosided_disp_functor) s₂
⋆v (λ (x y z : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
    (h : x -->h y) (k : y -->h z),
    id_v_square (pr2 h ·h pr2 k)) x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂ =
transportb_square
  (id_v_right (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v₁) @
   ! id_v_left (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v₁))
  (id_v_right (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v₃) @
   ! id_v_left (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) v₃))
  ((λ (x y z : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
    (h : x -->h y) (k : y -->h z),
    id_v_square (pr2 h ·h pr2 k)) x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁
   ⋆v (#2 pr2_twosided_disp_functor) (s₁ ⋆h s₂))
 abstract
        (intro ; intros ;
         cbn ;
         rewrite square_id_left_v ;
         rewrite square_id_right_v ;
         rewrite transportb_b_square ;
         use transportb_square_eq ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_lunitor
  (double_cat_double_lunitor
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (double_cat_double_lunitor D₂)
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_id
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_comp

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_lunitor
  (double_cat_double_lunitor
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (double_cat_double_lunitor D₂)
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_id
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_comp

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ (x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(h : x -->h y),
lunitor_h (pr2_twosided_disp_functor x y h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x))
     (id₁ (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x))
     (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ x)) @
   id_left
     (id₁ (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x)
      · # (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ x)) @
   id_left (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ x)) @
   functor_id (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) x)
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ y))
     (id₁ (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ y))
     (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ y)) @
   id_left
     (id₁ (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ y)
      · # (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ y)) @
   id_left (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ y)) @
   functor_id (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) y)
  (functor_double_id_cell
     prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_id x
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_comp
        (double_id
           (hor_id_double_cat
              (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)) x) h
   ⋆v (#2 pr2_twosided_disp_functor) (lunitor_h h))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
lunitor_h (pr2 h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 x))
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h)
   ⋆v id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 x) ·h pr2 h)
   ⋆v lunitor_h (pr2 h))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
lunitor_h (pr2 h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportf_square
     (assoc (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)))
     (assoc (identity_v (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y))
        (id₁ (pr2 y)))
     (id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 x))
      ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h)
      ⋆v (id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 x) ·h pr2 h)
          ⋆v lunitor_h (pr2 h))))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
lunitor_h (pr2 h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc (identity_v (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y))
     (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 x))
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h)
   ⋆v (id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 x) ·h pr2 h)
       ⋆v lunitor_h (pr2 h)))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assoc (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc (identity_v (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y))
     (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 x))
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h)
   ⋆v (id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 x) ·h pr2 h)
       ⋆v lunitor_h (pr2 h))) = lunitor_h (pr2 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assoc (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc (identity_v (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y))
     (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 x))
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h)
   ⋆v (id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 x) ·h pr2 h)
       ⋆v lunitor_h (pr2 h))) = ?b
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
?b = lunitor_h (pr2 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assoc (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc (identity_v (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y))
     (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 x))
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h)
   ⋆v (id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 x) ·h pr2 h)
       ⋆v lunitor_h (pr2 h))) = ?b

      
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 x) ·h pr2 h)
⋆v lunitor_h (pr2 h) = ?t2

      apply (square_id_left_v (C := D₂)).
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assoc (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc (identity_v (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y))
     (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 x))
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h)
   ⋆v transportb_square (id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)))
        (id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))) (lunitor_h (pr2 h))) =
lunitor_h (pr2 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assoc (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc (identity_v (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y))
     (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 x))
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h)
   ⋆v transportf_square (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)))
        (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))) (lunitor_h (pr2 h))) =
lunitor_h (pr2 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assoc (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc (identity_v (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y))
     (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr2 x -->v pr2 x, id₁ (pr2 x) ·v z)
        (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 x))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr2 y -->v pr2 y,
         identity_v (pr2 y) ·v z)
        (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))))
     (id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 x))
      ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h) ⋆v lunitor_h (pr2 h))) =
lunitor_h (pr2 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 x -->v pr2 x, id₁ (pr2 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 x))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 y -->v pr2 y, identity_v (pr2 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y))
     (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 x))
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h) ⋆v lunitor_h (pr2 h)) =
lunitor_h (pr2 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 x -->v pr2 x, id₁ (pr2 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 x))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 y -->v pr2 y, identity_v (pr2 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y))
     (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_h_square (identity_v (pr2 x))
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h) ⋆v lunitor_h (pr2 h)) =
lunitor_h (pr2 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 x -->v pr2 x, id₁ (pr2 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 x))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 y -->v pr2 y, identity_v (pr2 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y))
     (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_h_square (identity_v (pr2 x))
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h) ⋆v lunitor_h (pr2 h)) = 
?b

x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
?b = lunitor_h (pr2 h)

h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 x -->v pr2 x, id₁ (pr2 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 x))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 y -->v pr2 y, identity_v (pr2 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y))
     (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_h_square (identity_v (pr2 x))
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h) ⋆v lunitor_h (pr2 h)) = 
?b

      
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
id_h_square (identity_v (pr2 x))
⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h) ⋆v lunitor_h (pr2 h) = ?t2

      apply (lunitor_square (C := D₂)).
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 x -->v pr2 x, id₁ (pr2 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 x))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 y -->v pr2 y, identity_v (pr2 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y))
     (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportb_square
     (id_v_right (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
      ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr2 x)))
     (id_v_right (identity_v (pr2 y)) @
      ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr2 y)))
     (lunitor_h (pr2 h) ⋆v id_v_square (pr2 h))) =
lunitor_h (pr2 h)

x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 x -->v pr2 x, id₁ (pr2 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 x))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 y -->v pr2 y, identity_v (pr2 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y))
     (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportf_square
     (! (id_v_right (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
         ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr2 x))))
     (! (id_v_right (identity_v (pr2 y)) @
         ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr2 y))))
     (lunitor_h (pr2 h) ⋆v id_v_square (pr2 h))) =
lunitor_h (pr2 h)

x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (! (id_v_right (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
      ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr2 x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 x -->v pr2 x, id₁ (pr2 x) ·v z)

  (! (id_v_right (identity_v (pr2 y)) @
      ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr2 y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 y -->v pr2 y, identity_v (pr2 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))) @

   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @

     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportb_square (id_right (identity_v (pr2 x)))
     (id_right (identity_v (pr2 y)))
     (lunitor_h (pr2 h))) = lunitor_h (pr2 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (! (id_v_right (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
      ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr2 x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 x -->v pr2 x, id₁ (pr2 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 x))) @

   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @

   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
