  (! (id_v_right (identity_v (pr2 y)) @
      ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr2 y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 y -->v pr2 y, identity_v (pr2 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))) @

     (id₁ (pr2 y)) @

   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @

     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportf_square (! id_right (identity_v (pr2 x)))
     (! id_right (identity_v (pr2 y)))
     (lunitor_h (pr2 h))) = lunitor_h (pr2 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (! id_right (identity_v (pr2 x)) @
   ! (id_v_right (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
      ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr2 x))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 x -->v pr2 x, id₁ (pr2 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 x))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (! id_right (identity_v (pr2 y)) @
   ! (id_v_right (identity_v (pr2 y)) @
      ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr2 y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 y -->v pr2 y, identity_v (pr2 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y))
     (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (lunitor_h (pr2 h)) = lunitor_h (pr2 h)

    apply transportf_square_id.
  Qed.

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_runitor
  (double_cat_double_runitor
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (double_cat_double_runitor D₂)
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_id
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_comp

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_runitor
  (double_cat_double_runitor
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (double_cat_double_runitor D₂)
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_id
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_comp

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ (x y : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(h : x -->h y),
runitor_h (pr2_twosided_disp_functor x y h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x))
     (id₁ (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x))
     (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ x)) @
   id_left
     (id₁ (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ x)
      · # (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ x)) @
   id_left (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ x)) @
   functor_id (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) x)
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ y))
     (id₁ (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ y))
     (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ y)) @
   id_left
     (id₁ (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ y)
      · # (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ y)) @
   id_left (# (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) (id₁ y)) @
   functor_id (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) y)
  (id_v_square (pr2_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
   ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
        prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_id y
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_comp h
        (double_id
           (hor_id_double_cat
              (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)) y)
   ⋆v (#2 pr2_twosided_disp_functor) (runitor_h h))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
runitor_h (pr2 h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (pr2 h)
   ⋆h id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 y))
   ⋆v id_v_square (pr2 h ·h identity_h (pr2 y))
   ⋆v runitor_h (pr2 h))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
runitor_h (pr2 h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportf_square
     (assoc (identity_v (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x))
        (id₁ (pr2 x)))
     (assoc (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)))
     (id_v_square (pr2 h)
      ⋆h id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 y))
      ⋆v (id_v_square (pr2 h ·h identity_h (pr2 y))
          ⋆v runitor_h (pr2 h))))

  (id_v_square (pr2 h)
   ⋆h id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 y))
   ⋆v (id_v_square (pr2 h ·h identity_h (pr2 y))
       ⋆v runitor_h (pr2 h)))

  (assoc (identity_v (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x))

  (assoc (identity_v (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x))

   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (pr2 h)
   ⋆h id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 y))
   ⋆v (id_v_square (pr2 h ·h identity_h (pr2 y))
       ⋆v runitor_h (pr2 h))) = ?b

      
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
id_v_square (pr2 h ·h identity_h (pr2 y))
⋆v runitor_h (pr2 h) = ?t2

      apply (square_id_left_v (C := D₂)).
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assoc (identity_v (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x))
     (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (pr2 h)
   ⋆h id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 y))
   ⋆v transportb_square (id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)))
        (id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))) (runitor_h (pr2 h))) =
runitor_h (pr2 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assoc (identity_v (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x))
     (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (id_v_square (pr2 h)
   ⋆h id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 y))
   ⋆v transportf_square (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)))
        (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))) (runitor_h (pr2 h))) =
runitor_h (pr2 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assoc (identity_v (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x))
     (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (assoc (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr2 x -->v pr2 x,
         identity_v (pr2 x) ·v z)
        (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 x))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr2 y -->v pr2 y, id₁ (pr2 y) ·v z)
        (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))))
     (id_v_square (pr2 h)
      ⋆h id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 y))
      ⋆v runitor_h (pr2 h))) = runitor_h (pr2 h)

h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 x -->v pr2 x, identity_v (pr2 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 x))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x))
     (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 y -->v pr2 y, id₁ (pr2 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @

  (id_v_square (pr2 h)
   ⋆h id_v_square (identity_h (pr2 y))
   ⋆v runitor_h (pr2 h)) = runitor_h (pr2 h)

D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 x -->v pr2 x, identity_v (pr2 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 x))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x))
     (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 y -->v pr2 y, id₁ (pr2 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (transportb_square
     (id_v_right (identity_v (pr2 x)) @
      ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr2 x)))
     (id_v_right (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
      ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr2 y)))
     (runitor_h (pr2 h) ⋆v id_v_square (pr2 h))) =
runitor_h (pr2 h)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
x, y: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 x -->v pr2 x, identity_v (pr2 x) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 x))) @
   assoc (identity_v (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x))
     (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @

     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 y -->v pr2 y, id₁ (pr2 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))) @

  (transportf_square
     (! (id_v_right (identity_v (pr2 x)) @
         ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr2 x))))
     (! (id_v_right (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
         ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr2 y))))
     (runitor_h (pr2 h) ⋆v id_v_square (pr2 h))) =
runitor_h (pr2 h)

   assoc (identity_v (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x))
     (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x) · id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 x)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) x)
  (! id_right (identity_v (pr2 y)) @
   ! (id_v_right (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
      ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr2 y))) @
   maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 y -->v pr2 y, id₁ (pr2 y) ·v z)
     (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 y))) @
   assoc (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   assoc' (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y) · id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 y)) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) y)
  (runitor_h (pr2 h)) = runitor_h (pr2 h)

    apply transportf_square_id.
  Qed.

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_associator
  (double_cat_double_associator
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (double_cat_double_associator D₂)
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_comp

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_associator
  (double_cat_double_associator
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (double_cat_double_associator D₂)
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_comp

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
∏ (w x y z : prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
(h₁ : w -->h x) (h₂ : x -->h y) (h₃ : y -->h z),
lassociator_h (pr2_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
  (pr2_twosided_disp_functor x y h₂)
  (pr2_twosided_disp_functor y z h₃)
⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
     prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_comp h₁ h₂
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2_twosided_disp_functor y z h₃)
⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
     prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_comp (h₁ ·h h₂)
     h₃ =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ w)
         ·v id₁ (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ w)))
     (functor_id (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (id₁ (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ z)
         ·v id₁ (pr2_functor D₁ D₂ z)))
     (functor_id (pr2_functor D₁ D₂) z))
  (id_v_square (pr2_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
   ⋆h functor_double_comp_cell
        prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_comp h₂ h₃
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_comp h₁
        (h₂ ·h h₃)
   ⋆v (#2 pr2_twosided_disp_functor)
        (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃)
⋆v id_v_square (pr2 h₁ ·h pr2 h₂)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₃)
⋆v id_v_square ((pr2 h₁ ·h pr2 h₂) ·h pr2 h₃) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr2 w) ·v id₁ (pr2 w)))
     (functor_id
        (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr2 z) ·v id₁ (pr2 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₂ ·h pr2 h₃)
   ⋆v id_v_square (pr2 h₁ ·h (pr2 h₂ ·h pr2 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃))

h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃)
⋆v id_v_square (pr2 h₁ ·h pr2 h₂)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₃)
⋆v id_v_square ((pr2 h₁ ·h pr2 h₂) ·h pr2 h₃) = ?b
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
?b =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr2 w) ·v id₁ (pr2 w)))
     (functor_id
        (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr2 z) ·v id₁ (pr2 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₂ ·h pr2 h₃)
   ⋆v id_v_square (pr2 h₁ ·h (pr2 h₂ ·h pr2 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat

h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃)

   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₃)
⋆v id_v_square ((pr2 h₁ ·h pr2 h₂) ·h pr2 h₃) = ?b

      apply (square_id_right_v (C := D₂)).
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
transportb_square
  (id_right (identity_v (pr2 w) ·v id₁ (pr2 w)))
  (id_right (identity_v (pr2 z) ·v identity_v (pr2 z)))
  (lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃)
   ⋆v id_v_square (pr2 h₁ ·h pr2 h₂)
      ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₃)) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr2 w) ·v id₁ (pr2 w)))
     (functor_id
        (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr2 z) ·v id₁ (pr2 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₂ ·h pr2 h₃)
   ⋆v id_v_square (pr2 h₁ ·h (pr2 h₂ ·h pr2 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃))

  (! id_right (identity_v (pr2 w) ·v id₁ (pr2 w)))
  (! id_right

        z))
  (id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₂ ·h pr2 h₃)
   ⋆v id_v_square (pr2 h₁ ·h (pr2 h₂ ·h pr2 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃))

w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
?t2 =
lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃)
⋆v id_v_square (pr2 h₁) ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₂)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₃)

D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
transportf_square
  (! id_right (identity_v (pr2 w) ·v id₁ (pr2 w)))
  (! id_right
       (identity_v (pr2 z) ·v identity_v (pr2 z)))
  (transportf_square
     (id_v_right (id₁ (pr2 w)) @
      ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr2 w)))
     (id_v_right (identity_v (pr2 z)) @
      ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr2 z)))
     (id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
      ⋆h (id_v_square (pr2 h₂) ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₃))
      ⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃))) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr2 w) ·v id₁ (pr2 w)))
     (functor_id
        (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr2 z) ·v id₁ (pr2 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₂ ·h pr2 h₃)
   ⋆v id_v_square (pr2 h₁ ·h (pr2 h₂ ·h pr2 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃))

transportf_square
  ((id_v_right (id₁ (pr2 w)) @
    ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr2 w))) @
   ! id_right (identity_v (pr2 w) ·v id₁ (pr2 w)))
  ((id_v_right (identity_v (pr2 z)) @

   ! id_right
       (identity_v (pr2 z) ·v identity_v (pr2 z)))
  (id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
   ⋆h (id_v_square (pr2 h₂) ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃)) =

  (maponpaths

        (identity_v (pr2 w) ·v id₁ (pr2 w)))
     (functor_id
        (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr2 z) ·v id₁ (pr2 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₂ ·h pr2 h₃)
   ⋆v id_v_square (pr2 h₁ ·h (pr2 h₂ ·h pr2 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃))

transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr2 w) ·v id₁ (pr2 w)))
     (functor_id

        w))

     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr2 z) ·v id₁ (pr2 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (transportb_square (id_right (identity_v (pr2 w)))
     (id_right (id₁ (pr2 z)))
     (id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
      ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₂ ·h pr2 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃)) =
transportf_square
  ((id_v_right (id₁ (pr2 w)) @
    ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr2 w))) @
   ! id_right (identity_v (pr2 w) ·v id₁ (pr2 w)))
  ((id_v_right (identity_v (pr2 z)) @
    ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr2 z))) @
   ! id_right
       (identity_v (pr2 z) ·v identity_v (pr2 z)))
  (id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
   ⋆h (id_v_square (pr2 h₂) ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr2 w) ·v id₁ (pr2 w)))
     (functor_id
        (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr2 z) ·v id₁ (pr2 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (transportf_square (! id_right (identity_v (pr2 w)))
     (! id_right (id₁ (pr2 z)))
     (id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
      ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₂ ·h pr2 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃)) =
transportf_square
  ((id_v_right (id₁ (pr2 w)) @
    ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr2 w))) @
   ! id_right (identity_v (pr2 w) ·v id₁ (pr2 w)))
  ((id_v_right (identity_v (pr2 z)) @
    ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr2 z))) @
   ! id_right
       (identity_v (pr2 z) ·v identity_v (pr2 z)))
  (id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
   ⋆h (id_v_square (pr2 h₂) ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr2 w) ·v id₁ (pr2 w)))
     (functor_id
        (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr2 z) ·v id₁ (pr2 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths
        (λ z : pr2 w -->v pr2 w, z ·v id₁ (pr2 w))
        (! id_right (identity_v (pr2 w))))
     (maponpaths
        (λ z0 : pr2 z -->v pr2 z, z0 ·v id₁ (pr2 z))
        (! id_right (id₁ (pr2 z))))
     (id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
      ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₂ ·h pr2 h₃)
      ⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃))) =
transportf_square
  ((id_v_right (id₁ (pr2 w)) @
    ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr2 w))) @
   ! id_right (identity_v (pr2 w) ·v id₁ (pr2 w)))
  ((id_v_right (identity_v (pr2 z)) @
    ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr2 z))) @
   ! id_right
       (identity_v (pr2 z) ·v identity_v (pr2 z)))
  (id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
   ⋆h (id_v_square (pr2 h₂) ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (λ z : pr2 w -->v pr2 w, z ·v id₁ (pr2 w))
     (! id_right (identity_v (pr2 w))) @
   maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (pr2 w) ·v id₁ (pr2 w)))
     (functor_id
        (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        w))
  (maponpaths
     (λ z0 : pr2 z -->v pr2 z, z0 ·v id₁ (pr2 z))
     (! id_right (id₁ (pr2 z))) @
   maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (pr2 z) ·v id₁ (pr2 z)))
     (functor_id
        (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
        z))
  (id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
   ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₂ ·h pr2 h₃)
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃)) =
transportf_square
  ((id_v_right (id₁ (pr2 w)) @
    ! id_v_left (id₁ (pr2 w))) @
   ! id_right (identity_v (pr2 w) ·v id₁ (pr2 w)))
  ((id_v_right (identity_v (pr2 z)) @
    ! id_v_left (identity_v (pr2 z))) @
   ! id_right
       (identity_v (pr2 z) ·v identity_v (pr2 z)))
  (id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
   ⋆h (id_v_square (pr2 h₂) ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₃))
   ⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃))

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
id_v_square (pr2 h₁) ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₂ ·h pr2 h₃)
⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃) =
id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
⋆h (id_v_square (pr2 h₂) ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₃))
⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃)

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
w, x, y, z: prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
⋆h (id_v_square (pr2 h₂) ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₃))
⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃) =
id_v_square (pr2 h₁)
⋆h (id_v_square (pr2 h₂) ⋆h id_v_square (pr2 h₃))
⋆v lassociator_h (pr2 h₁) (pr2 h₂) (pr2 h₃)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
lax_double_functor (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
  D₂

  
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
lax_double_functor (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
  D₂

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂ ⟶ D₂
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
twosided_disp_functor ?F ?F
  (hor_mor (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (hor_mor D₂)
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_hor_id ?FF
  (hor_id_double_cat (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (hor_id_double_cat D₂)
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_hor_comp ?FF
  (hor_comp_double_cat
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (hor_comp_double_cat D₂)
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_lunitor
  (double_cat_double_lunitor
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (double_cat_double_lunitor D₂) ?FI ?FC
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_runitor
  (double_cat_double_runitor
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (double_cat_double_runitor D₂) ?FI ?FC
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_associator
  (double_cat_double_associator
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (double_cat_double_associator D₂) ?FC

    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂ ⟶ D₂
 apply pr2_functor.
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
twosided_disp_functor (pr2_functor D₁ D₂)
  (pr2_functor D₁ D₂)
  (hor_mor (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (hor_mor D₂)
 exact pr2_twosided_disp_functor.
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_hor_id pr2_twosided_disp_functor
  (hor_id_double_cat (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (hor_id_double_cat D₂)
 exact prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_id.
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_hor_comp pr2_twosided_disp_functor
  (hor_comp_double_cat
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (hor_comp_double_cat D₂)
 exact prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_comp.
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_lunitor
  (double_cat_double_lunitor
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (double_cat_double_lunitor D₂)
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_id
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_comp
 exact prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_lunitor.
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_runitor
  (double_cat_double_runitor
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (double_cat_double_runitor D₂)
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_id
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_comp
 exact prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_runitor.
    
D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
double_functor_associator
  (double_cat_double_associator
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  (double_cat_double_associator D₂)
  prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_hor_comp
 exact prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2_associator.
  Defined.
End Projections.

(** * 6. Pairing *)
Section Pairing.
  Context {C D₁ D₂ : univalent_double_cat}
          (F : lax_double_functor C D₁)
          (G : lax_double_functor C D₂).

  Let FG : C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂ := bindelta_pair_functor F G.

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂) FG

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂) FG

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ x y : C, x -->h y → FG x -->h FG y
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
(λ FF : ∏ x y : C, x -->h y → FG x -->h FG y,
 ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (h : x₁ -->h y₁) (k : x₂ -->h y₂)
 (v : x₁ -->v x₂) (w : y₁ -->v y₂),
 square v w h k
 → square (# FG v) (# FG w) (FF x₁ y₁ h) (FF x₂ y₂ k))
  ?pr1

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ x y : C, x -->h y → FG x -->h FG y
 exact (λ x y h, #h F h ,, #h G h).
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
(λ FF : ∏ x y : C, x -->h y → FG x -->h FG y,
 ∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : C) (h : x₁ -->h y₁) (k : x₂ -->h y₂)
 (v : x₁ -->v x₂) (w : y₁ -->v y₂),
 square v w h k
 → square (# FG v) (# FG w) (FF x₁ y₁ h) (FF x₂ y₂ k))
  (λ (x y : C) (h : x -->h y), #h F h,, #h G h)
 exact (λ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ h₁ h₂ f g s, #s F s ,, #s G s).
  Defined.

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_laws
  pair_twosided_disp_functor_data

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_laws
  pair_twosided_disp_functor_data

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ (x y : C) (h : x -->h y),
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
  pair_twosided_disp_functor_data (id_v_square h) =
transportb_square (functor_id FG x) (functor_id FG y)
  (id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor_data x y h))
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂ y₃ : C) (h₁ : x₁ -->h y₁)
(h₂ : x₂ -->h y₂) (h₃ : x₃ -->h y₃) (vx₁ : x₁ -->v x₂)
(vy₁ : y₁ -->v y₂) (s₁ : square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂)
(vx₂ : x₂ -->v x₃) (vy₂ : y₂ -->v y₃)
(s₂ : square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃),
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
  pair_twosided_disp_functor_data (s₁ ⋆v s₂) =
transportb_square (functor_comp FG vx₁ vx₂)
  (functor_comp FG vy₁ vy₂)
  (twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
     pair_twosided_disp_functor_data s₁
   ⋆v twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
        pair_twosided_disp_functor_data s₂)

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ (x y : C) (h : x -->h y),
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
  pair_twosided_disp_functor_data (id_v_square h) =
transportb_square (functor_id FG x) (functor_id FG y)
  (id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor_data x y h))
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
  pair_twosided_disp_functor_data (id_v_square h) =
transportb_square (functor_id FG x) (functor_id FG y)
  (id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor_data x y h))

      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
#s F (id_v_square h) =
pr1
  (transportb_square (functor_id FG x)
     (functor_id FG y) (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h)))
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
#s G (id_v_square h) =
pr2
  (transportb_square (functor_id FG x)
     (functor_id FG y) (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h)))

      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
#s F (id_v_square h) =
pr1
  (transportb_square (functor_id FG x)
     (functor_id FG y) (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h)))
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
transportb_square (lax_double_functor_id_v F x)
  (lax_double_functor_id_v F y) (id_v_square (#h F h)) =
pr1
  (transportb_square (functor_id FG x)
     (functor_id FG y) (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h)))

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr1
  (transportb_square (functor_id FG x)
     (functor_id FG y) (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h))) =
transportb_square (lax_double_functor_id_v F x)
  (lax_double_functor_id_v F y) (id_v_square (#h F h))

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr1
  (transportb_square (functor_id FG x)
     (functor_id FG y) (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h))) =
?b
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
?b =
transportb_square (lax_double_functor_id_v F x)
  (lax_double_functor_id_v F y) (id_v_square (#h F h))

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr1
  (transportb_square (functor_id FG x)
     (functor_id FG y) (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h))) =
?b

          
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
transportb_square (functor_id FG x) (functor_id FG y)
  (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h)) = ?t2

          exact (transportb_prod_double_cat D₁ D₂ _ _ (id_v_square _)).
        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr1
  (transportb_square
     (maponpaths pr1 (functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths pr1 (functor_id FG y))
     (pr1 (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h))),,
   transportb_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 (functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 (functor_id FG y))
     (pr2 (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h)))) =
transportb_square (lax_double_functor_id_v F x)
  (lax_double_functor_id_v F y) (id_v_square (#h F h))

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr1 (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h)) =
id_v_square (#h F h)

        apply idpath.
      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
#s G (id_v_square h) =
pr2
  (transportb_square (functor_id FG x)
     (functor_id FG y) (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h)))
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
transportb_square (lax_double_functor_id_v G x)
  (lax_double_functor_id_v G y) (id_v_square (#h G h)) =
pr2
  (transportb_square (functor_id FG x)
     (functor_id FG y) (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h)))

x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr2
  (transportb_square (functor_id FG x)
     (functor_id FG y) (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h))) =
transportb_square (lax_double_functor_id_v G x)
  (lax_double_functor_id_v G y) (id_v_square (#h G h))

  (transportb_square (functor_id FG x)
     (functor_id FG y) (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h))) =

x, y: C

C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
transportb_square (functor_id FG x) (functor_id FG y)
  (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h)) = ?t2

          exact (transportb_prod_double_cat D₁ D₂ _ _ (id_v_square _)).
        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr2
  (transportb_square
     (maponpaths pr1 (functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths pr1 (functor_id FG y))
     (pr1 (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h))),,
   transportb_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 (functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 (functor_id FG y))
     (pr2 (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h)))) =
transportb_square (lax_double_functor_id_v G x)
  (lax_double_functor_id_v G y) (id_v_square (#h G h))

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr2 (id_v_square (#h F h,, #h G h)) =
id_v_square (#h G h)

        apply idpath.
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂ y₃ : C) (h₁ : x₁ -->h y₁)
(h₂ : x₂ -->h y₂) (h₃ : x₃ -->h y₃) (vx₁ : x₁ -->v x₂)
(vy₁ : y₁ -->v y₂) (s₁ : square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂)
(vx₂ : x₂ -->v x₃) (vy₂ : y₂ -->v y₃)
(s₂ : square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃),
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
  pair_twosided_disp_functor_data (s₁ ⋆v s₂) =
transportb_square (functor_comp FG vx₁ vx₂)
  (functor_comp FG vy₁ vy₂)
  (twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
     pair_twosided_disp_functor_data s₁
   ⋆v twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
        pair_twosided_disp_functor_data s₂)
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
h₁: x₁ -->h y₁
h₂: x₂ -->h y₂
h₃: x₃ -->h y₃
vx₁: x₁ -->v x₂
vy₁: y₁ -->v y₂
s₁: square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂
vx₂: x₂ -->v x₃
vy₂: y₂ -->v y₃
s₂: square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
  pair_twosided_disp_functor_data (s₁ ⋆v s₂) =
transportb_square (functor_comp FG vx₁ vx₂)
  (functor_comp FG vy₁ vy₂)
  (twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
     pair_twosided_disp_functor_data s₁
   ⋆v twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data_square
        pair_twosided_disp_functor_data s₂)

      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
h₁: x₁ -->h y₁
h₂: x₂ -->h y₂
h₃: x₃ -->h y₃
vx₁: x₁ -->v x₂
vy₁: y₁ -->v y₂
s₁: square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂
vx₂: x₂ -->v x₃
vy₂: y₂ -->v y₃
s₂: square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃
#s F (s₁ ⋆v s₂) =
pr1
  (transportb_square (functor_comp FG vx₁ vx₂)
     (functor_comp FG vy₁ vy₂)
     ((#s F s₁,, #s G s₁) ⋆v (#s F s₂,, #s G s₂)))

vx₁: x₁ -->v x₂
vy₁: y₁ -->v y₂

vy₂: y₂ -->v y₃

F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
h₁: x₁ -->h y₁
h₂: x₂ -->h y₂
h₃: x₃ -->h y₃
vx₁: x₁ -->v x₂
vy₁: y₁ -->v y₂
s₁: square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂
vx₂: x₂ -->v x₃
vy₂: y₂ -->v y₃
s₂: square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃
transportb_square
  (lax_double_functor_comp_v F vx₁ vx₂)
  (lax_double_functor_comp_v F vy₁ vy₂)
  (#s F s₁ ⋆v #s F s₂) =
pr1
  (transportb_square (functor_comp FG vx₁ vx₂)
     (functor_comp FG vy₁ vy₂)
     ((#s F s₁,, #s G s₁) ⋆v (#s F s₂,, #s G s₂)))

h₂: x₂ -->h y₂

C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
h₁: x₁ -->h y₁
h₂: x₂ -->h y₂
h₃: x₃ -->h y₃
vx₁: x₁ -->v x₂
vy₁: y₁ -->v y₂
s₁: square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂
vx₂: x₂ -->v x₃
vy₂: y₂ -->v y₃
s₂: square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃
transportb_square (functor_comp FG vx₁ vx₂)
  (functor_comp FG vy₁ vy₂)
  ((#s F s₁,, #s G s₁) ⋆v (#s F s₂,, #s G s₂)) = ?t2

          exact (transportb_prod_double_cat D₁ D₂ _ _ (_ ⋆v _)).
        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
h₁: x₁ -->h y₁
h₂: x₂ -->h y₂
h₃: x₃ -->h y₃
vx₁: x₁ -->v x₂
vy₁: y₁ -->v y₂
s₁: square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂
vx₂: x₂ -->v x₃
vy₂: y₂ -->v y₃
s₂: square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃
pr1
  (transportb_square
     (maponpaths pr1 (functor_comp FG vx₁ vx₂))
     (maponpaths pr1 (functor_comp FG vy₁ vy₂))
     (pr1 ((#s F s₁,, #s G s₁) ⋆v (#s F s₂,, #s G s₂))),,
   transportb_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 (functor_comp FG vx₁ vx₂))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 (functor_comp FG vy₁ vy₂))
     (pr2 ((#s F s₁,, #s G s₁) ⋆v (#s F s₂,, #s G s₂)))) =
transportb_square
  (lax_double_functor_comp_v F vx₁ vx₂)
  (lax_double_functor_comp_v F vy₁ vy₂)
  (#s F s₁ ⋆v #s F s₂)

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
h₁: x₁ -->h y₁
h₂: x₂ -->h y₂
h₃: x₃ -->h y₃
vx₁: x₁ -->v x₂
vy₁: y₁ -->v y₂
s₁: square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂
vx₂: x₂ -->v x₃
vy₂: y₂ -->v y₃
s₂: square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃
pr1 ((#s F s₁,, #s G s₁) ⋆v (#s F s₂,, #s G s₂)) =
#s F s₁ ⋆v #s F s₂

        apply idpath.
      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂

h₂: x₂ -->h y₂

vy₁: y₁ -->v y₂

vx₂: x₂ -->v x₃
vy₂: y₂ -->v y₃
s₂: square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃
#s G (s₁ ⋆v s₂) =
pr2
  (transportb_square (functor_comp FG vx₁ vx₂)
     (functor_comp FG vy₁ vy₂)
     ((#s F s₁,, #s G s₁) ⋆v (#s F s₂,, #s G s₂)))
