C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
h₁: x₁ -->h y₁
h₂: x₂ -->h y₂
h₃: x₃ -->h y₃
vx₁: x₁ -->v x₂
vy₁: y₁ -->v y₂
s₁: square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂
vx₂: x₂ -->v x₃
vy₂: y₂ -->v y₃
s₂: square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃
pr2
  (transportb_square (functor_comp FG vx₁ vx₂)
     (functor_comp FG vy₁ vy₂)
     ((#s F s₁,, #s G s₁) ⋆v (#s F s₂,, #s G s₂))) =
?b

          
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
h₁: x₁ -->h y₁
h₂: x₂ -->h y₂
h₃: x₃ -->h y₃
vx₁: x₁ -->v x₂
vy₁: y₁ -->v y₂
s₁: square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂
vx₂: x₂ -->v x₃
vy₂: y₂ -->v y₃
s₂: square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃
transportb_square (functor_comp FG vx₁ vx₂)
  (functor_comp FG vy₁ vy₂)
  ((#s F s₁,, #s G s₁) ⋆v (#s F s₂,, #s G s₂)) = ?t2

          exact (transportb_prod_double_cat D₁ D₂ _ _ (_ ⋆v _)).
        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
h₁: x₁ -->h y₁
h₂: x₂ -->h y₂
h₃: x₃ -->h y₃
vx₁: x₁ -->v x₂
vy₁: y₁ -->v y₂
s₁: square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂
vx₂: x₂ -->v x₃
vy₂: y₂ -->v y₃
s₂: square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃
pr2
  (transportb_square
     (maponpaths pr1 (functor_comp FG vx₁ vx₂))
     (maponpaths pr1 (functor_comp FG vy₁ vy₂))
     (pr1 ((#s F s₁,, #s G s₁) ⋆v (#s F s₂,, #s G s₂))),,
   transportb_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 (functor_comp FG vx₁ vx₂))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2 (functor_comp FG vy₁ vy₂))
     (pr2 ((#s F s₁,, #s G s₁) ⋆v (#s F s₂,, #s G s₂)))) =
transportb_square
  (lax_double_functor_comp_v G vx₁ vx₂)
  (lax_double_functor_comp_v G vy₁ vy₂)
  (#s G s₁ ⋆v #s G s₂)

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: C
h₁: x₁ -->h y₁
h₂: x₂ -->h y₂
h₃: x₃ -->h y₃
vx₁: x₁ -->v x₂
vy₁: y₁ -->v y₂
s₁: square vx₁ vy₁ h₁ h₂
vx₂: x₂ -->v x₃
vy₂: y₂ -->v y₃
s₂: square vx₂ vy₂ h₂ h₃
pr2 ((#s F s₁,, #s G s₁) ⋆v (#s F s₂,, #s G s₂)) =
#s G s₁ ⋆v #s G s₂

        apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
twosided_disp_functor FG FG (hor_mor C)
  (hor_mor (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
twosided_disp_functor FG FG (hor_mor C)
  (hor_mor (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂) FG
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_laws ?FF

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_data C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂) FG
 exact pair_twosided_disp_functor_data.
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
twosided_disp_functor_double_cat_laws
  pair_twosided_disp_functor_data
 exact pair_twosided_disp_functor_laws.
  Defined.

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
double_functor_hor_id pair_twosided_disp_functor
  (hor_id_double_cat C)
  (hor_id_double_cat (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
double_functor_hor_id pair_twosided_disp_functor
  (hor_id_double_cat C)
  (hor_id_double_cat (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ x : C,
square (identity_v (FG x)) (identity_v (FG x))
  (identity_h (FG x))
  (pair_twosided_disp_functor x x (identity_h x))
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ (x y : C) (v : x -->v y),
id_h_square (# FG v) ⋆v ?FFi y =
transportb_square
  (id_v_right (# FG v) @ ! id_v_left (# FG v))
  (id_v_right (# FG v) @ ! id_v_left (# FG v))
  (?FFi x
   ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) (id_h_square v))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ x : C,
square (identity_v (FG x)) (identity_v (FG x))
  (identity_h (FG x))
  (pair_twosided_disp_functor x x (identity_h x))
 exact (λ x, lax_double_functor_id_h F _ ,, lax_double_functor_id_h G _).
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ (x y : C) (v : x -->v y),
id_h_square (# FG v)
⋆v (λ x0 : C,
    lax_double_functor_id_h F x0,,
    lax_double_functor_id_h G x0) y =
transportb_square
  (id_v_right (# FG v) @ ! id_v_left (# FG v))
  (id_v_right (# FG v) @ ! id_v_left (# FG v))
  ((λ x0 : C,
    lax_double_functor_id_h F x0,,
    lax_double_functor_id_h G x0) x
   ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) (id_h_square v))
 abstract
        (intros x y v ;
         refine (_ @ !(transportb_prod_double_cat D₁ D₂ _ _ _)) ;
         use dirprodeq ; cbn ;
         refine (lax_double_functor_id_h_mor _ _ @ _) ;
         use transportb_square_eq ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
double_functor_hor_comp pair_twosided_disp_functor
  (hor_comp_double_cat C)
  (hor_comp_double_cat
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
double_functor_hor_comp pair_twosided_disp_functor
  (hor_comp_double_cat C)
  (hor_comp_double_cat
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ (x y z : C) (h : x -->h y) (k : y -->h z),
square (identity_v (FG x)) (identity_v (FG z))
  (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h
   ·h pair_twosided_disp_functor y z k)
  (pair_twosided_disp_functor x z (h ·h k))
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : C) (v₁ : x₁ -->v x₂)
(v₂ : y₁ -->v y₂) (v₃ : z₁ -->v z₂) (h₁ : x₁ -->h y₁)
(h₂ : x₂ -->h y₂) (k₁ : y₁ -->h z₁) (k₂ : y₂ -->h z₂)
(s₁ : square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂) (s₂ : square v₂ v₃ k₁ k₂),
(#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) s₁
⋆h (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) s₂
⋆v ?FFc x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂ =
transportb_square
  (id_v_right (# FG v₁) @ ! id_v_left (# FG v₁))
  (id_v_right (# FG v₃) @ ! id_v_left (# FG v₃))
  (?FFc x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁
   ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) (s₁ ⋆h s₂))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ (x y z : C) (h : x -->h y) (k : y -->h z),
square (identity_v (FG x)) (identity_v (FG z))
  (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h
   ·h pair_twosided_disp_functor y z k)
  (pair_twosided_disp_functor x z (h ·h k))
 exact (λ x y z h k,
             lax_double_functor_comp_h F _ _
             ,,
             lax_double_functor_comp_h G _ _).
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : C) (v₁ : x₁ -->v x₂)
(v₂ : y₁ -->v y₂) (v₃ : z₁ -->v z₂) (h₁ : x₁ -->h y₁)
(h₂ : x₂ -->h y₂) (k₁ : y₁ -->h z₁) (k₂ : y₂ -->h z₂)
(s₁ : square v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂) (s₂ : square v₂ v₃ k₁ k₂),
(#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) s₁
⋆h (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) s₂
⋆v (λ (x y z : C) (h : x -->h y) (k : y -->h z),
    lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k,,
    lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k) x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂ =
transportb_square
  (id_v_right (# FG v₁) @ ! id_v_left (# FG v₁))
  (id_v_right (# FG v₃) @ ! id_v_left (# FG v₃))
  ((λ (x y z : C) (h : x -->h y) (k : y -->h z),
    lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k,,
    lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k) x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁
   ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) (s₁ ⋆h s₂))
 abstract
        (intros ;
         refine (_ @ !(transportb_prod_double_cat D₁ D₂ _ _ _)) ;
         use dirprodeq ;
         refine (lax_double_functor_comp_h_mor _ _ _ @ _) ;
         use transportb_square_eq ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
double_functor_lunitor (double_cat_double_lunitor C)
  (double_cat_double_lunitor
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id
  pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
double_functor_lunitor (double_cat_double_lunitor C)
  (double_cat_double_lunitor
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id
  pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ (x y : C) (h : x -->h y),
lunitor_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x)) (# FG (id₁ x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
   id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x)
  (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y)) (# FG (id₁ y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
   id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y)
  (functor_double_id_cell
     pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id x
   ⋆h id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp
        (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) x) h
   ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) (lunitor_h h))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
lunitor_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x)) (# FG (id₁ x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
   id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x)
  (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y)) (# FG (id₁ y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
   id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y)
  (functor_double_id_cell
     pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id x
   ⋆h id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp
        (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) x) h
   ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) (lunitor_h h))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
lunitor_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths pr1
     (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x)) (# FG (id₁ x)) @
      id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
      id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y)) (# FG (id₁ y)) @
      id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
      id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
  (pr1
     (functor_double_id_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id x
      ⋆h id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
      ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp
           (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) x) h
      ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) (lunitor_h h))),,
transportf_square
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x)) (# FG (id₁ x)) @
      id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
      id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y)) (# FG (id₁ y)) @
      id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
      id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
  (pr2
     (functor_double_id_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id x
      ⋆h id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
      ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp
           (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) x) h
      ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) (lunitor_h h)))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr1 (lunitor_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)) =
pr1
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr1
        (functor_double_id_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id x
         ⋆h id_v_square
              (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) x) h
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lunitor_h h))),,
   transportf_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr2
        (functor_double_id_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id x
         ⋆h id_v_square
              (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) x) h
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lunitor_h h))))
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr2 (lunitor_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)) =
pr2
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr1
        (functor_double_id_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id x
         ⋆h id_v_square
              (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) x) h
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lunitor_h h))),,
   transportf_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr2
        (functor_double_id_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id x
         ⋆h id_v_square
              (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) x) h
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lunitor_h h))))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr1 (lunitor_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)) =
pr1
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr1
        (functor_double_id_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id x
         ⋆h id_v_square
              (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) x) h
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lunitor_h h))),,
   transportf_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr2
        (functor_double_id_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id x
         ⋆h id_v_square
              (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) x) h
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lunitor_h h))))
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assocr_v (identity_v (F x)) (identity_v (F x))
     (#v F (identity_v x)) @
   id_v_left (identity_v (F x) · #v F (identity_v x)) @
   id_v_left (#v F (identity_v x)) @
   lax_double_functor_id_v F x)
  (assocr_v (identity_v (F y)) (identity_v (F y))
     (#v F (identity_v y)) @
   id_v_left (identity_v (F y) · #v F (identity_v y)) @
   id_v_left (#v F (identity_v y)) @
   lax_double_functor_id_v F y)
  (lax_double_functor_id_h F x ⋆h id_v_square (#h F h)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h x) h
   ⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h)) =
pr1
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr1
        (functor_double_id_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id x
         ⋆h id_v_square
              (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) x) h
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lunitor_h h))),,
   transportf_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr2
        (functor_double_id_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id x
         ⋆h id_v_square
              (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) x) h
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lunitor_h h))))

      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
lax_double_functor_id_h F x ⋆h id_v_square (#h F h)
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F (identity_h x) h
⋆v #s F (lunitor_h h) =
pr1
  (functor_double_id_cell
     pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id x
   ⋆h id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp
        (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) x) h
   ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) (lunitor_h h))

      apply idpath.
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr2 (lunitor_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)) =
pr2
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr1
        (functor_double_id_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id x
         ⋆h id_v_square
              (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) x) h
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lunitor_h h))),,
   transportf_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr2
        (functor_double_id_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id x
         ⋆h id_v_square
              (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) x) h
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lunitor_h h))))
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assocr_v (identity_v (G x)) (identity_v (G x))
     (#v G (identity_v x)) @
   id_v_left (identity_v (G x) · #v G (identity_v x)) @
   id_v_left (#v G (identity_v x)) @
   lax_double_functor_id_v G x)
  (assocr_v (identity_v (G y)) (identity_v (G y))
     (#v G (identity_v y)) @
   id_v_left (identity_v (G y) · #v G (identity_v y)) @
   id_v_left (#v G (identity_v y)) @
   lax_double_functor_id_v G y)
  (lax_double_functor_id_h G x ⋆h id_v_square (#h G h)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G (identity_h x) h
   ⋆v #s G (lunitor_h h)) =
pr2
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr1
        (functor_double_id_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id x
         ⋆h id_v_square
              (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) x) h
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lunitor_h h))),,
   transportf_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr2
        (functor_double_id_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id x
         ⋆h id_v_square
              (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) x) h
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lunitor_h h))))

      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
lax_double_functor_id_h G x ⋆h id_v_square (#h G h)
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G (identity_h x) h
⋆v #s G (lunitor_h h) =
pr2
  (functor_double_id_cell
     pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id x
   ⋆h id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp
        (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) x) h
   ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) (lunitor_h h))

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
double_functor_runitor (double_cat_double_runitor C)
  (double_cat_double_runitor
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id
  pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
double_functor_runitor (double_cat_double_runitor C)
  (double_cat_double_runitor
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id
  pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ (x y : C) (h : x -->h y),
runitor_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x)) (# FG (id₁ x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
   id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x)
  (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y)) (# FG (id₁ y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
   id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y)
  (id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
   ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id y
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h
        (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) y)
   ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) (runitor_h h))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
runitor_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h) =
transportf_square
  (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x)) (# FG (id₁ x)) @
   id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
   id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x)
  (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y)) (# FG (id₁ y)) @
   id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
   id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y)
  (id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
   ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id y
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h
        (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) y)
   ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) (runitor_h h))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
runitor_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h) =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths pr1
     (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x)) (# FG (id₁ x)) @
      id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
      id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y)) (# FG (id₁ y)) @
      id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
      id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
  (pr1
     (id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
      ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id y
      ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h
           (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) y)
      ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) (runitor_h h))),,
transportf_square
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x)) (# FG (id₁ x)) @
      id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
      id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y)) (# FG (id₁ y)) @
      id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
      id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
  (pr2
     (id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
      ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id y
      ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h
           (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) y)
      ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) (runitor_h h)))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr1 (runitor_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)) =
pr1
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr1
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id y
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) y)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (runitor_h h))),,
   transportf_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr2
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id y
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) y)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (runitor_h h))))
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr2 (runitor_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)) =
pr2
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr1
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id y
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) y)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (runitor_h h))),,
   transportf_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr2
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id y
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) y)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (runitor_h h))))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr1 (runitor_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)) =
pr1
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr1
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id y
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) y)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (runitor_h h))),,
   transportf_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr2
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id y
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) y)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (runitor_h h))))
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assocr_v (identity_v (F x)) (identity_v (F x))
     (#v F (identity_v x)) @
   id_v_left (identity_v (F x) · #v F (identity_v x)) @
   id_v_left (#v F (identity_v x)) @
   lax_double_functor_id_v F x)
  (assocr_v (identity_v (F y)) (identity_v (F y))
     (#v F (identity_v y)) @
   id_v_left (identity_v (F y) · #v F (identity_v y)) @
   id_v_left (#v F (identity_v y)) @
   lax_double_functor_id_v F y)
  (id_v_square (#h F h) ⋆h lax_double_functor_id_h F y
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h (identity_h y)
   ⋆v #s F (runitor_h h)) =
pr1
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr1
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id y
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) y)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (runitor_h h))),,
   transportf_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr2
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id y
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) y)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (runitor_h h))))

      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
id_v_square (#h F h) ⋆h lax_double_functor_id_h F y
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h (identity_h y)
⋆v #s F (runitor_h h) =
pr1
  (id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
   ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id y
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h
        (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) y)
   ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) (runitor_h h))

      apply idpath.
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr2 (runitor_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)) =
pr2
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr1
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id y
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) y)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (runitor_h h))),,
   transportf_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr2
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id y
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) y)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (runitor_h h))))
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
transportf_square
  (assocr_v (identity_v (G x)) (identity_v (G x))
     (#v G (identity_v x)) @
   id_v_left (identity_v (G x) · #v G (identity_v x)) @
   id_v_left (#v G (identity_v x)) @
   lax_double_functor_id_v G x)
  (assocr_v (identity_v (G y)) (identity_v (G y))
     (#v G (identity_v y)) @
   id_v_left (identity_v (G y) · #v G (identity_v y)) @
   id_v_left (#v G (identity_v y)) @
   lax_double_functor_id_v G y)
  (id_v_square (#h G h) ⋆h lax_double_functor_id_h G y
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h (identity_h y)
   ⋆v #s G (runitor_h h)) =
pr2
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr1
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id y
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) y)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (runitor_h h))),,
   transportf_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG x)) (id₁ (FG x))
           (# FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG x) · # FG (id₁ x)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ x)) @ functor_id FG x))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (assoc' (id₁ (FG y)) (id₁ (FG y))
           (# FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (id₁ (FG y) · # FG (id₁ y)) @
         id_left (# FG (id₁ y)) @ functor_id FG y))
     (pr2
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
         ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id y
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h
              (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) y)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (runitor_h h))))

      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
id_v_square (#h G h) ⋆h lax_double_functor_id_h G y
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h (identity_h y)
⋆v #s G (runitor_h h) =
pr2
  (id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h)
   ⋆h functor_double_id_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_id y
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h
        (double_id (hor_id_double_cat C) y)
   ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor) (runitor_h h))

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
double_functor_associator
  (double_cat_double_associator C)
  (double_cat_double_associator
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
double_functor_associator
  (double_cat_double_associator C)
  (double_cat_double_associator
     (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂))
  pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ (w x y z : C) (h₁ : w -->h x) (h₂ : x -->h y)
(h₃ : y -->h z),
lassociator_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
  (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h₂)
  (pair_twosided_disp_functor y z h₃)
⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
     pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁ h₂
   ⋆h id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor y z h₃)
⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
     pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃ =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (FG w) ·v id₁ (FG w)))
     (functor_id FG w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (FG z) ·v id₁ (FG z)))
     (functor_id FG z))
  (id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
   ⋆h functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₂ h₃
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁ (h₂ ·h h₃)
   ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
        (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
w, x, y, z: C
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
lassociator_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
  (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h₂)
  (pair_twosided_disp_functor y z h₃)
⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
     pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁ h₂
   ⋆h id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor y z h₃)
⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
     pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃ =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (FG w) ·v id₁ (FG w)))
     (functor_id FG w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (FG z) ·v id₁ (FG z)))
     (functor_id FG z))
  (id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
   ⋆h functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₂ h₃
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁ (h₂ ·h h₃)
   ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
        (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
w, x, y, z: C
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
lassociator_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
  (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h₂)
  (pair_twosided_disp_functor y z h₃)
⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
     pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁ h₂
   ⋆h id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor y z h₃)
⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
     pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃ =
transportf_square
  (maponpaths pr1
     (maponpaths
        (ver_comp_double_cat
           (identity_v (FG w) ·v id₁ (FG w)))
        (functor_id FG w)))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (maponpaths
        (ver_comp_double_cat
           (id₁ (FG z) ·v id₁ (FG z)))
        (functor_id FG z)))
  (pr1
     (id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
      ⋆h functor_double_comp_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₂ h₃
      ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁
           (h₂ ·h h₃)
      ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
           (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))),,
transportf_square
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (maponpaths
        (ver_comp_double_cat
           (identity_v (FG w) ·v id₁ (FG w)))
        (functor_id FG w)))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (maponpaths
        (ver_comp_double_cat
           (id₁ (FG z) ·v id₁ (FG z)))
        (functor_id FG z)))
  (pr2
     (id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
      ⋆h functor_double_comp_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₂ h₃
      ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
           pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁
           (h₂ ·h h₃)
      ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
           (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃)))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
w, x, y, z: C
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
pr1
  (lassociator_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
     (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h₂)
     (pair_twosided_disp_functor y z h₃)
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁ h₂
      ⋆h id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor y z h₃)
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃) =
pr1
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (identity_v (FG w) ·v id₁ (FG w)))
           (functor_id FG w)))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (id₁ (FG z) ·v id₁ (FG z)))
           (functor_id FG z)))
     (pr1
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
         ⋆h functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₂ h₃
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁
              (h₂ ·h h₃)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))),,
   transportf_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (identity_v (FG w) ·v id₁ (FG w)))
           (functor_id FG w)))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (id₁ (FG z) ·v id₁ (FG z)))
           (functor_id FG z)))
     (pr2
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
         ⋆h functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₂ h₃
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁
              (h₂ ·h h₃)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))))
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
w, x, y, z: C
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
pr2
  (lassociator_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
     (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h₂)
     (pair_twosided_disp_functor y z h₃)
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁ h₂
      ⋆h id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor y z h₃)
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃) =
pr2
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (identity_v (FG w) ·v id₁ (FG w)))
           (functor_id FG w)))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (id₁ (FG z) ·v id₁ (FG z)))
           (functor_id FG z)))
     (pr1
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
         ⋆h functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₂ h₃
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁
              (h₂ ·h h₃)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))),,
   transportf_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (identity_v (FG w) ·v id₁ (FG w)))
           (functor_id FG w)))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (id₁ (FG z) ·v id₁ (FG z)))
           (functor_id FG z)))
     (pr2
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
         ⋆h functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₂ h₃
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁
              (h₂ ·h h₃)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
w, x, y, z: C
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
pr1
  (lassociator_h (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
     (pair_twosided_disp_functor x y h₂)
     (pair_twosided_disp_functor y z h₃)
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁ h₂
      ⋆h id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor y z h₃)
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp (h₁ ·h h₂) h₃) =
pr1
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (identity_v (FG w) ·v id₁ (FG w)))
           (functor_id FG w)))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (id₁ (FG z) ·v id₁ (FG z)))
           (functor_id FG z)))
     (pr1
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
         ⋆h functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₂ h₃
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁
              (h₂ ·h h₃)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))),,
   transportf_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (identity_v (FG w) ·v id₁ (FG w)))
           (functor_id FG w)))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (id₁ (FG z) ·v id₁ (FG z)))
           (functor_id FG z)))
     (pr2
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
         ⋆h functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₂ h₃
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁
              (h₂ ·h h₃)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))))
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
w, x, y, z: C
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (F w) ·v id₁ (F w)))
     (lax_double_functor_id_v F w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (F z) ·v id₁ (F z)))
     (lax_double_functor_id_v F z))
  (id_v_square (#h F h₁)
   ⋆h lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₂ h₃
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ (h₂ ·h h₃)
   ⋆v #s F (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃)) =
pr1
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (identity_v (FG w) ·v id₁ (FG w)))
           (functor_id FG w)))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (id₁ (FG z) ·v id₁ (FG z)))
           (functor_id FG z)))
     (pr1
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
         ⋆h functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₂ h₃
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁
              (h₂ ·h h₃)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))),,
   transportf_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (identity_v (FG w) ·v id₁ (FG w)))
           (functor_id FG w)))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (id₁ (FG z) ·v id₁ (FG z)))
           (functor_id FG z)))
     (pr2
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
         ⋆h functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₂ h₃
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁
              (h₂ ·h h₃)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))))

      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
w, x, y, z: C
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
id_v_square (#h F h₁)
⋆h lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₂ h₃
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h₁ (h₂ ·h h₃)
⋆v #s F (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃) =
pr1
  (id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
   ⋆h functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₂ h₃
   ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁ (h₂ ·h h₃)
   ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
        (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))

      apply idpath.

         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell

              (h₂ ·h h₃)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))),,
   transportf_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (maponpaths

              (identity_v (FG w) ·v id₁ (FG w)))

     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2

              (h₂ ·h h₃)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))))
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
w, x, y, z: C
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
transportf_square
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat
        (identity_v (G w) ·v id₁ (G w)))
     (lax_double_functor_id_v G w))
  (maponpaths
     (ver_comp_double_cat (id₁ (G z) ·v id₁ (G z)))
     (lax_double_functor_id_v G z))
  (id_v_square (#h G h₁)
   ⋆h lax_double_functor_comp_h G h₂ h₃
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h₁ (h₂ ·h h₃)
   ⋆v #s G (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃)) =
pr2
  (transportf_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (identity_v (FG w) ·v id₁ (FG w)))
           (functor_id FG w)))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (id₁ (FG z) ·v id₁ (FG z)))
           (functor_id FG z)))
     (pr1
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
         ⋆h functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₂ h₃
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁
              (h₂ ·h h₃)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))),,
   transportf_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (identity_v (FG w) ·v id₁ (FG w)))
           (functor_id FG w)))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (maponpaths
           (ver_comp_double_cat
              (id₁ (FG z) ·v id₁ (FG z)))
           (functor_id FG z)))
     (pr2
        (id_v_square
           (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
         ⋆h functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₂ h₃
         ⋆v functor_double_comp_cell
              pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₁
              (h₂ ·h h₃)
         ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
              (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))))

      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
w, x, y, z: C
h₁: w -->h x
h₂: x -->h y
h₃: y -->h z
id_v_square (#h G h₁)
⋆h lax_double_functor_comp_h G h₂ h₃
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h₁ (h₂ ·h h₃)
⋆v #s G (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃) =

  (id_v_square (pair_twosided_disp_functor w x h₁)
   ⋆h functor_double_comp_cell
        pair_lax_double_functor_hor_comp h₂ h₃

   ⋆v (#2 pair_twosided_disp_functor)
        (lassociator_h h₁ h₂ h₃))

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

 exact pair_lax_double_functor_associator.
  Defined.

  Definition pair_lax_double_functor_pr1_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
    : twosided_disp_nat_trans_double_cat_data F F (bindelta_pair_pr1 F G)
    := λ x y h, id_v_square (#h F h).

  Arguments pair_lax_double_functor_pr1_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data /.

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
twosided_disp_nat_trans_double_cat_laws
  pair_lax_double_functor_pr1_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
twosided_disp_nat_trans_double_cat_laws
  pair_lax_double_functor_pr1_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
#s F s ⋆v id_v_square (#h F k) =
transportb_square
  (bindelta_pair_pr1_is_nat_trans F G x₁ x₂ v)
  (bindelta_pair_pr1_is_nat_trans F G y₁ y₂ w)
  (id_v_square (#h F h) ⋆v #s F s)

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
#s F s ⋆v id_v_square (#h F k) = ?b
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
?b =
transportb_square
  (bindelta_pair_pr1_is_nat_trans F G x₁ x₂ v)
  (bindelta_pair_pr1_is_nat_trans F G y₁ y₂ w)
  (id_v_square (#h F h) ⋆v #s F s)

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
#s F s ⋆v id_v_square (#h F k) = ?b

      apply (square_id_right_v (C := D₁)).
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
transportb_square (id_right (#v F v))
  (id_right (#v F w)) (#s F s) =
transportb_square
  (bindelta_pair_pr1_is_nat_trans F G x₁ x₂ v)
  (bindelta_pair_pr1_is_nat_trans F G y₁ y₂ w)
  (id_v_square (#h F h) ⋆v #s F s)

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
transportb_square
  (bindelta_pair_pr1_is_nat_trans F G x₁ x₂ v)
  (bindelta_pair_pr1_is_nat_trans F G y₁ y₂ w)
  (id_v_square (#h F h) ⋆v #s F s) =
transportb_square (id_right (#v F v))
  (id_right (#v F w)) (#s F s)

F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
transportb_square
  (bindelta_pair_pr1_is_nat_trans F G x₁ x₂ v)
  (bindelta_pair_pr1_is_nat_trans F G y₁ y₂ w)
  (id_v_square (#h F h) ⋆v #s F s) = ?b

C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
transportb_square
  (bindelta_pair_pr1_is_nat_trans F G x₁ x₂ v)
  (bindelta_pair_pr1_is_nat_trans F G y₁ y₂ w)
  (transportb_square (id_left (# F v))
     (id_left (# F w)) (#s F s)) =

F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
transportb_square
  (bindelta_pair_pr1_is_nat_trans F G x₁ x₂ v @
   id_left (# F v))
  (bindelta_pair_pr1_is_nat_trans F G y₁ y₂ w @
   id_left (# F w)) (#s F s) =
transportb_square (id_right (#v F v))
  (id_right (#v F w)) (#s F s)

w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
#s F s = #s F s

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ x : C,
lax_double_functor_id_h
  (pair_lax_double_functor
   · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) x
⋆v pair_lax_double_functor_pr1_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     x x (identity_h x) =
transportb_square
  (id_left (bindelta_pair_pr1 F G x) @
   ! id_right (bindelta_pair_pr1 F G x))
  (id_left (bindelta_pair_pr1 F G x) @
   ! id_right (bindelta_pair_pr1 F G x))
  (id_h_square (bindelta_pair_pr1 F G x)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F x)

                                            F x))
⋆v id_v_square (#h F (identity_h x)) =
transportb_square
  (id_left (id₁ (F x)) @ ! id_right (id₁ (F x)))
  (id_left (id₁ (F x)) @ ! id_right (id₁ (F x)))
  (id_h_square (id₁ (F x))
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F x)

x: C
id_h_square (id₁ (F x)) ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h F x =
?b

C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x: C
transportf_square
  (! (id_left (id₁ (F x)) @ ! id_right (id₁ (F x))))
  (! (id_left (id₁ (F x)) @ ! id_right (id₁ (F x))))
  (transportb_square (id_left (id₁ (F x)))
     (id_left (id₁ (F x)))
     (lax_double_functor_id_h F x)) =
transportf_square
  ((id_left (id₁ (F x)) @
    functor_id
      (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
      (make_catbinprod (F x) (G x))) @
   ! id_right (identity_v (F x)))
  ((id_left (id₁ (F x)) @
    functor_id
      (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
      (make_catbinprod (F x) (G x))) @
   ! id_right (identity_v (F x)))
  (transportb_square (id_left (identity_v (F x)))
     (id_left (identity_v (F x)))
     (lax_double_functor_id_h F x))

  (! id_left (id₁ (F x)) @

   ! id_right (identity_v (F x)))
  (lax_double_functor_id_h F x)

  Qed.

double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  pair_lax_double_functor_pr1_twosided_disp_nat_trans
  (lax_double_functor_hor_comp

G: lax_double_functor C D₂

∏ (x y z : C) (h : x -->h y) (k : y -->h z),
lax_double_functor_comp_h
  (pair_lax_double_functor
   · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) h k
⋆v pair_lax_double_functor_pr1_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     x z (h ·h k) =
trb₂ pair_lax_double_functor_pr1_twosided_disp_nat_trans
       x y h
     ⋆h pair_lax_double_functor_pr1_twosided_disp_nat_trans

G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂

  (! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))

       x @ ! id_right (id₁ (F x)))
  (! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof0 (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) FG
       (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       z @ ! id_right (id₁ (F z)))

                                        F h k) =
trb₂ id_v_square (#h F h) ⋆h id_v_square (#h F k)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k

transportf_square
  (! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) FG
       (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       x @ ! id_right (id₁ (F x)))
  (! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof0 (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) FG
       (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       z @ ! id_right (id₁ (F z)))
  (transportb_square (id_left (id₁ (F x)))
     (id_left (id₁ (F z)))
     (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k))

x, y, z: C
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
trb₂ transportf_square (! id_left (id₁ (F x)))
       (! id_left (id₁ (F z)))
       (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k) =
transportf_square
  (! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) FG
       (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       x @ ! id_right (id₁ (F x)))
  (! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof0 (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) FG
       (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       z @ ! id_right (id₁ (F z)))
  (transportf_square (! id_left (id₁ (F x)))
     (! id_left (id₁ (F z)))
     (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k))

F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y, z: C
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
transportf_square
  (! id_left (id₁ (F x)) @
   ! (id_left (id₁ (F x)) @ ! id_right (id₁ (F x))))
  (! id_left (id₁ (F z)) @
   ! (id_left (id₁ (F z)) @ ! id_right (id₁ (F z))))

transportf_square
  (! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) FG
       (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       x @ ! id_right (id₁ (F x)))
  (! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof0 (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) FG
       (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       z @ ! id_right (id₁ (F z)))
  (transportf_square (! id_left (id₁ (F x)))
     (! id_left (id₁ (F z)))
     (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k))

G: lax_double_functor C D₂

x, y, z: C

k: y -->h z

  (! id_left (id₁ (F x)) @

  (! id_left (id₁ (F z)) @

          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) FG

       z @ ! id_right (id₁ (F z)))
  (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k)

         x)) x)

     pair_lax_double_functor_pr1 f)

      apply id_is_iso_twosided_disp.
  Defined.

  Definition pair_lax_double_functor_pr2_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
    : twosided_disp_nat_trans_double_cat_data G G (bindelta_pair_pr2 F G)
    := λ x y h, id_v_square (#h G h).

C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
#s G s ⋆v id_v_square (#h G k) =
transportb_square
  (bindelta_pair_pr2_is_nat_trans F G x₁ x₂ v)
  (bindelta_pair_pr2_is_nat_trans F G y₁ y₂ w)
  (id_v_square (#h G h) ⋆v #s G s)

G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
#s G s ⋆v id_v_square (#h G k) = ?b

G: lax_double_functor C D₂

v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
?b =
transportb_square
  (bindelta_pair_pr2_is_nat_trans F G x₁ x₂ v)
  (bindelta_pair_pr2_is_nat_trans F G y₁ y₂ w)
  (id_v_square (#h G h) ⋆v #s G s)

h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
#s G s ⋆v id_v_square (#h G k) = ?b

      apply (square_id_right_v (C := D₂)).
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
transportb_square (id_right (#v G v))
  (id_right (#v G w)) (#s G s) =
transportb_square
  (bindelta_pair_pr2_is_nat_trans F G x₁ x₂ v)
  (bindelta_pair_pr2_is_nat_trans F G y₁ y₂ w)
  (id_v_square (#h G h) ⋆v #s G s)

C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
id_v_square (#h G h) ⋆v #s G s = ?t2

      apply (square_id_left_v (C := D₂)).
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
transportb_square
  (bindelta_pair_pr2_is_nat_trans F G x₁ x₂ v)
  (bindelta_pair_pr2_is_nat_trans F G y₁ y₂ w)
  (transportb_square (id_left (# G v))
     (id_left (# G w)) (#s G s)) =
transportb_square (id_right (#v G v))
  (id_right (#v G w)) (#s G s)

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
transportb_square
  (bindelta_pair_pr2_is_nat_trans F G x₁ x₂ v @
   id_left (# G v))
  (bindelta_pair_pr2_is_nat_trans F G y₁ y₂ w @
   id_left (# G w)) (#s G s) =
transportb_square (id_right (#v G v))
  (id_right (#v G w)) (#s G s)

G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
#s G s = #s G s

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  (pair_lax_double_functor
   · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) x

F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x: C
transportf_square
  (! (id_left (bindelta_pair_pr2_data F G x) @
      ! id_right (bindelta_pair_pr2_data F G x)))
  (! (id_left (bindelta_pair_pr2_data F G x) @
      ! id_right (bindelta_pair_pr2_data F G x)))
  (transportf_square (! id_left (id₁ (G x)))
     (! id_left (id₁ (G x)))
     (lax_double_functor_id_h G x)) =
transportf_square
  ((id_left (id₁ (G x)) @
    functor_id
      (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
      (make_catbinprod (F x) (G x))) @
   ! id_right (identity_v (G x)))
  ((id_left (id₁ (G x)) @
    functor_id
      (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
      (make_catbinprod (F x) (G x))) @
   ! id_right (identity_v (G x)))
  (transportf_square (! id_left (identity_v (G x)))
     (! id_left (identity_v (G x)))
     (lax_double_functor_id_h G x))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x: C
transportf_square
  (! id_left (id₁ (G x)) @
   ! (id_left (bindelta_pair_pr2_data F G x) @
      ! id_right (bindelta_pair_pr2_data F G x)))
  (! id_left (id₁ (G x)) @
   ! (id_left (bindelta_pair_pr2_data F G x) @
      ! id_right (bindelta_pair_pr2_data F G x)))
  (lax_double_functor_id_h G x) =
transportf_square
  (! id_left (identity_v (G x)) @
   (id_left (id₁ (G x)) @
    functor_id
      (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
      (make_catbinprod (F x) (G x))) @
   ! id_right (identity_v (G x)))
  (! id_left (identity_v (G x)) @
   (id_left (id₁ (G x)) @
    functor_id
      (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
      (make_catbinprod (F x) (G x))) @
   ! id_right (identity_v (G x)))
  (lax_double_functor_id_h G x)

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x: C
lax_double_functor_id_h G x =
lax_double_functor_id_h G x

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  pair_lax_double_functor_pr2_twosided_disp_nat_trans
  (lax_double_functor_hor_comp
     (pair_lax_double_functor
      · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂))
  (lax_double_functor_hor_comp G)

double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  pair_lax_double_functor_pr2_twosided_disp_nat_trans
  (lax_double_functor_hor_comp

      · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂))

C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ (x y z : C) (h : x -->h y) (k : y -->h z),
lax_double_functor_comp_h
  (pair_lax_double_functor
   · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) h k
⋆v pair_lax_double_functor_pr2_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     x z (h ·h k) =
trb₂ pair_lax_double_functor_pr2_twosided_disp_nat_trans
       x y h
     ⋆h pair_lax_double_functor_pr2_twosided_disp_nat_trans
          y z k ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k

x, y, z: C
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
(trb₂ (id_v_square (#h G h ·h #h G k) ;;2 lax_double_functor_comp_h
                                            G h k))
⋆v id_v_square (#h G (h ·h k)) =
trb₂ id_v_square (#h G h) ⋆h id_v_square (#h G k)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k

G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂

h: x -->h y

  (! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)) FG
       (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       x @ ! id_right (id₁ (G x)))
  (! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof0 (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)) FG
       (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       z @ ! id_right (id₁ (G z)))
  (id_v_square (#h G h ·h #h G k) ;;2 lax_double_functor_comp_h
                                        G h k) =
trb₂ id_v_square (#h G h) ⋆h id_v_square (#h G k)
     ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k
