  (transportf_square (! id_left (id₁ (G x)))
     (! id_left (id₁ (G z)))
     (lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y, z: C
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
trb₂ transportf_square (! id_left (id₁ (G x)))
       (! id_left (id₁ (G z)))
       (lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k) = ?b
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y, z: C
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
?b =
transportf_square
  (! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)) FG
       (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       x @ ! id_right (id₁ (G x)))
  (! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof0 (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)) FG
       (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       z @ ! id_right (id₁ (G z)))
  (transportf_square (! id_left (id₁ (G x)))
     (! id_left (id₁ (G z)))
     (lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y, z: C
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
trb₂ transportf_square (! id_left (id₁ (G x)))
       (! id_left (id₁ (G z)))
       (lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k) = ?b

      exact (transportf_f_square _ _ _ _ _).
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y, z: C
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
transportf_square
  (! id_left (id₁ (G x)) @
   ! (id_left (bindelta_pair_pr2_data F G x) @
      ! id_right (bindelta_pair_pr2_data F G x)))
  (! id_left (id₁ (G z)) @
   ! (id_left (bindelta_pair_pr2_data F G z) @
      ! id_right (bindelta_pair_pr2_data F G z)))
  (lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k) =
transportf_square
  (! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)) FG
       (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       x @ ! id_right (id₁ (G x)))
  (! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof0 (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)) FG
       (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       z @ ! id_right (id₁ (G z)))
  (transportf_square (! id_left (id₁ (G x)))
     (! id_left (id₁ (G z)))
     (lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y, z: C
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
transportf_square
  (! id_left (id₁ (G x)) @
   ! (id_left (bindelta_pair_pr2_data F G x) @
      ! id_right (bindelta_pair_pr2_data F G x)))
  (! id_left (id₁ (G z)) @
   ! (id_left (bindelta_pair_pr2_data F G z) @
      ! id_right (bindelta_pair_pr2_data F G z)))
  (lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k) =
transportf_square
  (! id_left (id₁ (G x)) @
   ! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)) FG
       (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       x @ ! id_right (id₁ (G x)))
  (! id_left (id₁ (G z)) @
   ! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof0 (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)) FG
       (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       z @ ! id_right (id₁ (G z)))
  (lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k)

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y, z: C
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k =
lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
double_transformation
  (pair_lax_double_functor
   · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) G

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
double_transformation
  (pair_lax_double_functor
   · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) G

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
(pair_lax_double_functor
 · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) ⟹ G
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
twosided_disp_nat_trans ?τ ?τ
  (lax_double_functor_hor_mor
     (pair_lax_double_functor
      · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂))
  (lax_double_functor_hor_mor G)
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
double_nat_trans_hor_id ?ττ
  (lax_double_functor_hor_id
     (pair_lax_double_functor
      · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂))
  (lax_double_functor_hor_id G)
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
double_nat_trans_hor_comp ?ττ
  (lax_double_functor_hor_comp
     (pair_lax_double_functor
      · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂))
  (lax_double_functor_hor_comp G)

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
(pair_lax_double_functor
 · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) ⟹ G
 apply bindelta_pair_pr2.
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
twosided_disp_nat_trans (bindelta_pair_pr2 F G)
  (bindelta_pair_pr2 F G)
  (lax_double_functor_hor_mor
     (pair_lax_double_functor
      · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂))
  (lax_double_functor_hor_mor G)
 exact pair_lax_double_functor_pr2_twosided_disp_nat_trans.
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  pair_lax_double_functor_pr2_twosided_disp_nat_trans
  (lax_double_functor_hor_id
     (pair_lax_double_functor
      · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂))
  (lax_double_functor_hor_id G)
 exact pair_lax_double_functor_pr2_hor_id.
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  pair_lax_double_functor_pr2_twosided_disp_nat_trans
  (lax_double_functor_hor_comp
     (pair_lax_double_functor
      · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂))
  (lax_double_functor_hor_comp G)
 exact pair_lax_double_functor_pr2_hor_comp.
  Defined.

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
is_invertible_2cell pair_lax_double_functor_pr2

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
is_invertible_2cell pair_lax_double_functor_pr2

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ x : C,
is_z_isomorphism (pair_lax_double_functor_pr2 x)
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ (x y : C) (f : x -->h y),
is_iso_twosided_disp (?Hτ x) (?Hτ y)
  (double_transformation_hor_mor
     pair_lax_double_functor_pr2 f)

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ x : C,
is_z_isomorphism (pair_lax_double_functor_pr2 x)
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x: C
is_z_isomorphism (pair_lax_double_functor_pr2 x)

      apply identity_is_z_iso.
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
∏ (x y : C) (f : x -->h y),
is_iso_twosided_disp
  ((λ x0 : C,
    identity_is_z_iso
      ((bindelta_pair_functor F G ∙ pr2_functor D₁ D₂)
         x0)) x)
  ((λ x0 : C,
    identity_is_z_iso
      ((bindelta_pair_functor F G ∙ pr2_functor D₁ D₂)
         x0)) y)
  (double_transformation_hor_mor
     pair_lax_double_functor_pr2 f)
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F: lax_double_functor C D₁
G: lax_double_functor C D₂
FG:= bindelta_pair_functor F G: C ⟶ category_binproduct D₁ D₂
x, y: C
f: x -->h y
is_iso_twosided_disp
  ((λ x : C,
    identity_is_z_iso
      ((bindelta_pair_functor F G ∙ pr2_functor D₁ D₂)
         x)) x)
  ((λ x : C,
    identity_is_z_iso
      ((bindelta_pair_functor F G ∙ pr2_functor D₁ D₂)
         x)) y)
  (double_transformation_hor_mor
     pair_lax_double_functor_pr2 f)

      apply id_is_iso_twosided_disp.
  Defined.
End Pairing.

(** * 7. Pairing of double transformations *)
Section PairTransformation.
  Context {C D₁ D₂ : univalent_double_cat}
          {F G : lax_double_functor C (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)}
          (τ : double_transformation
                 (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
                 (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂))
          (θ : double_transformation
                 (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
                 (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)).

  Definition pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
    : twosided_disp_nat_trans_double_cat_data F G (prod_nat_trans τ θ)
    := λ x y h,
       make_prod_square
         (double_transformation_hor_mor τ h)
         (double_transformation_hor_mor θ h).

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
twosided_disp_nat_trans_double_cat_laws
  pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
twosided_disp_nat_trans_double_cat_laws
  pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
#s F s
⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
     x₂ y₂ k =
transportb_square
  (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
     (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)) (pr111 (pr1 F))
     (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ x₁ x₂ v)
  (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
     (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)) (pr111 (pr1 F))
     (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ y₁ y₂ w)
  (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
     x₁ y₁ h ⋆v #s G s)

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
#s F s
⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
     x₂ y₂ k =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths pr1
     (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
        (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
        (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ x₁ x₂ v))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
        (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
        (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ y₁ y₂ w))
  (pr1
     (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x₁ y₁ h ⋆v #s G s)),,
transportb_square
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
        (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
        (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ x₁ x₂ v))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
        (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
        (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ y₁ y₂ w))
  (pr2
     (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x₁ y₁ h ⋆v #s G s))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
pr1
  (#s F s
   ⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x₂ y₂ k) =
pr1
  (transportb_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ x₁ x₂ v))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ y₁ y₂ w))
     (pr1
        (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           x₁ y₁ h ⋆v #s G s)),,
   transportb_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ x₁ x₂ v))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ y₁ y₂ w))
     (pr2
        (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           x₁ y₁ h ⋆v #s G s)))
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
pr2
  (#s F s
   ⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x₂ y₂ k) =
pr2
  (transportb_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ x₁ x₂ v))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ y₁ y₂ w))
     (pr1
        (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           x₁ y₁ h ⋆v #s G s)),,
   transportb_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ x₁ x₂ v))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ y₁ y₂ w))
     (pr2
        (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           x₁ y₁ h ⋆v #s G s)))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
pr1
  (#s F s
   ⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x₂ y₂ k) =
pr1
  (transportb_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ x₁ x₂ v))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ y₁ y₂ w))
     (pr1
        (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           x₁ y₁ h ⋆v #s G s)),,
   transportb_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ x₁ x₂ v))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ y₁ y₂ w))
     (pr2
        (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           x₁ y₁ h ⋆v #s G s)))
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
transportb_square (double_transformation_ver_mor τ v)
  (double_transformation_ver_mor τ w)
  (double_transformation_hor_mor τ h
   ⋆v #s (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) s) =
pr1
  (transportb_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ x₁ x₂ v))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ y₁ y₂ w))
     (pr1
        (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           x₁ y₁ h ⋆v #s G s)),,
   transportb_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ x₁ x₂ v))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ y₁ y₂ w))
     (pr2
        (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           x₁ y₁ h ⋆v #s G s)))

      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
double_transformation_hor_mor τ h
⋆v #s (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) s =
pr1
  (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
     x₁ y₁ h ⋆v #s G s)

      apply idpath.
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
pr2
  (#s F s
   ⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x₂ y₂ k) =
pr2
  (transportb_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ x₁ x₂ v))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ y₁ y₂ w))
     (pr1
        (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           x₁ y₁ h ⋆v #s G s)),,
   transportb_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ x₁ x₂ v))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ y₁ y₂ w))
     (pr2
        (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           x₁ y₁ h ⋆v #s G s)))
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
transportb_square (double_transformation_ver_mor θ v)
  (double_transformation_ver_mor θ w)
  (double_transformation_hor_mor θ h
   ⋆v #s (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) s) =
pr2
  (transportb_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ x₁ x₂ v))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ y₁ y₂ w))
     (pr1
        (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           x₁ y₁ h ⋆v #s G s)),,
   transportb_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ x₁ x₂ v))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (prod_nat_trans_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
           (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
           (pr111 (pr1 F)) (pr111 (pr1 G)) τ θ y₁ y₂ w))
     (pr2
        (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           x₁ y₁ h ⋆v #s G s)))

      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂: C
v: x₁ -->v x₂
w: y₁ -->v y₂
h: x₁ -->h y₁
k: x₂ -->h y₂
s: square v w h k
double_transformation_hor_mor θ h
⋆v #s (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) s =
pr2
  (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
     x₁ y₁ h ⋆v #s G s)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans
  (lax_double_functor_hor_id F)
  (lax_double_functor_hor_id G)

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
double_nat_trans_hor_id
  pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans
  (lax_double_functor_hor_id F)
  (lax_double_functor_hor_id G)

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
∏ x : C,
lax_double_functor_id_h F x
⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     x x (identity_h x) =
transportb_square
  (id_left (prod_nat_trans τ θ x) @
   ! id_right (prod_nat_trans τ θ x))
  (id_left (prod_nat_trans τ θ x) @
   ! id_right (prod_nat_trans τ θ x))
  (id_h_square (prod_nat_trans τ θ x)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h G x)

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
∏ x : pr111 (pr1 C),
lax_double_functor_id_h F x
⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
     x x (identity_h x) =
transportb_square
  (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x))
  (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x))
  (id_h_square (τ x,, θ x)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h G x)

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
lax_double_functor_id_h F x
⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
     x x (identity_h x) =
transportb_square
  (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x))
  (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x))
  (id_h_square (τ x,, θ x)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h G x)

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
lax_double_functor_id_h F x
⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
     x x (identity_h x) =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths pr1
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (pr1
     (id_h_square (τ x,, θ x)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h G x)),,
transportb_square
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (pr2
     (id_h_square (τ x,, θ x)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h G x))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
pr1
  (lax_double_functor_id_h F x
   ⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x x (identity_h x)) =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths pr1
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (pr1
     (id_h_square (τ x,, θ x)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h G x))
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
pr2
  (lax_double_functor_id_h F x
   ⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x x (identity_h x)) =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (pr2
     (id_h_square (τ x,, θ x)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h G x))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
pr1
  (lax_double_functor_id_h F x
   ⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x x (identity_h x)) =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths pr1
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (pr1
     (id_h_square (τ x,, θ x)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h G x))
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
pr1
  (lax_double_functor_id_h F x
   ⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x x (identity_h x)) =
lax_double_functor_id_h
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) x
⋆v double_transformation_hor_mor τ (identity_h x)
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
transportb_square
  (id_v_left (τ x) @ ! id_v_right (τ x))
  (id_v_left (τ x) @ ! id_v_right (τ x))
  (id_h_square (τ x)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h
        (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) x) =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths pr1
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (pr1
     (id_h_square (τ x,, θ x)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h G x))

      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
pr1
  (lax_double_functor_id_h F x
   ⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x x (identity_h x)) =
lax_double_functor_id_h
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) x
⋆v double_transformation_hor_mor τ (identity_h x)

F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
pr1 (lax_double_functor_id_h F x) =
lax_double_functor_id_h
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) x

  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)

lax_double_functor_id_h
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) x =
pr1 (lax_double_functor_id_h F x)

  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)

?b

        x x (identity_h x)) =

  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
pr2
  (lax_double_functor_id_h F x
   ⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x x (identity_h x)) =
lax_double_functor_id_h
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) x
⋆v double_transformation_hor_mor θ (identity_h x)
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
transportb_square
  (id_v_left (θ x) @ ! id_v_right (θ x))
  (id_v_left (θ x) @ ! id_v_right (θ x))
  (id_h_square (θ x)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h
        (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) x) =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (pr2
     (id_h_square (τ x,, θ x)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h G x))

      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
pr2
  (lax_double_functor_id_h F x
   ⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x x (identity_h x)) =
lax_double_functor_id_h
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) x
⋆v double_transformation_hor_mor θ (identity_h x)

F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
pr2 (lax_double_functor_id_h F x) =
lax_double_functor_id_h
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) x

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
lax_double_functor_id_h
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) x =
pr2 (lax_double_functor_id_h F x)

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
trf₂ (id_v_square
        (identity_h (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))) ;;2 
      pr2 (functor_double_id_cell (pr121 (pr1 F)) x)) =
pr2 (lax_double_functor_id_h F x)

x: pr111 (pr1 C)
trf₂ (id_v_square
        (identity_h (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))) ;;2 
      pr2 (functor_double_id_cell (pr121 (pr1 F)) x)) =
?b

?b = pr2 (lax_double_functor_id_h F x)

pr2 (functor_double_id_cell (pr121 (pr1 F)) x) = ?t2

          apply (square_id_left_v (C := D₂)).

       (id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))))
       (id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))))
       (pr2 (functor_double_id_cell (pr121 (pr1 F)) x)) =

       (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))))

C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
transportf_square
  (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
     ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))
  (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
     ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))
  (pr2 (functor_double_id_cell (pr121 (pr1 F)) x)) =
pr2 (lax_double_functor_id_h F x)

        apply transportf_square_id.

x: pr111 (pr1 C)
transportb_square
  (id_v_left (θ x) @ ! id_v_right (θ x))
  (id_v_left (θ x) @ ! id_v_right (θ x))
  (id_h_square (θ x)
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h
        (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) x) =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (pr2
     (id_h_square (τ x,, θ x)
      ⋆v lax_double_functor_id_h G x))

C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x: pr111 (pr1 C)
transportf_square
  (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 G)) x))) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 G)) x))) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
     ((pr111 (pr1 G)) x))
  (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 G)) x))) @
   id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 G)) x))) @
   functor_id
     (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
     ((pr111 (pr1 G)) x))
  (pr2 (functor_double_id_cell (pr121 (pr1 G)) x)) =
pr2 (lax_double_functor_id_h G x)

        apply transportf_square_id.
  Qed.

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans
  (lax_double_functor_hor_comp F)
  (lax_double_functor_hor_comp G)

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
double_nat_trans_hor_comp
  pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans
  (lax_double_functor_hor_comp F)
  (lax_double_functor_hor_comp G)

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
∏ (x y z : C) (h : x -->h y) (k : y -->h z),
lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k
⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans
     x z (h ·h k) =
trb₂ pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans
       x y h
     ⋆h pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans
          y z k ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
∏ (x y z : pr111 (pr1 C)) (h : (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y)
(k : (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z),
lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k
⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
     x z (h ·h k) =
trb₂ pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
       x y h
     ⋆h pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
          y z k ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k
⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
     x z (h ·h k) =
trb₂ pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
       x y h
     ⋆h pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
          y z k ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k
⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
     x z (h ·h k) =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths pr1
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (id_left (τ z,, θ z) @ ! id_right (τ z,, θ z)))
  (pr1
     (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x y h
      ⋆h pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           y z k ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k)),,
transportb_square
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (id_left (τ z,, θ z) @ ! id_right (τ z,, θ z)))
  (pr2
     (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x y h
      ⋆h pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           y z k ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k))

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat

  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
pr1
  (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k
   ⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x z (h ·h k)) =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths pr1
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (id_left (τ z,, θ z) @ ! id_right (τ z,, θ z)))
  (pr1
     (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x y h
      ⋆h pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           y z k ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k))

  (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k
   ⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x z (h ·h k)) =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2

  (pr2
     (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x y h

           y z k ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k))

x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)

pr1
  (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k
   ⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x z (h ·h k)) =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths pr1
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (maponpaths pr1

C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
pr1
  (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k
   ⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x z (h ·h k)) =
lax_double_functor_comp_h
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) h k
⋆v double_transformation_hor_mor τ (h ·h k)
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
transportb_square
  (id_v_left (τ x) @ ! id_v_right (τ x))
  (id_v_left (τ z) @ ! id_v_right (τ z))
  (double_transformation_hor_mor τ h
   ⋆h double_transformation_hor_mor τ k
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h
        (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) h k) =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths pr1
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (id_left (τ z,, θ z) @ ! id_right (τ z,, θ z)))
  (pr1
     (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x y h
      ⋆h pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           y z k ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k))

      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
pr1
  (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k
   ⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x z (h ·h k)) =
lax_double_functor_comp_h
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) h k
⋆v double_transformation_hor_mor τ (h ·h k)

F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)

θ: double_transformation

x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
pr1 (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k) =
lax_double_functor_comp_h
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) h k

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)

h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
lax_double_functor_comp_h
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) h k =
pr1 (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k)

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
trb₂ (id_v_square
        (pr1 ((pr211 (pr1 F)) x y h)
         ·h pr1 ((pr211 (pr1 F)) y z k)) ;;2 pr1
                                               (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 (pr221 
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F)) h
                                                 k)) =
pr1 (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k)

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)

x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
trb₂ (id_v_square
        (pr1 ((pr211 (pr1 F)) x y h)
         ·h pr1 ((pr211 (pr1 F)) y z k)) ;;2 pr1
                                               (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 (pr221 
                                                 (pr1
                                                 F)) h
                                                 k)) =
?b
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)

x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y

?b = pr1 (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k)

F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z

        (pr1 ((pr211 (pr1 F)) x y h)
         ·h pr1 ((pr211 (pr1 F)) y z k)) ;;2 pr1
                                               (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 (pr221 
                                                 (pr1

                                                 k)) =

C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
id_v_square
  (pr1 ((pr211 (pr1 F)) x y h)
   ·h pr1 ((pr211 (pr1 F)) y z k)) ;;2 pr1
                                         (functor_double_comp_cell
                                            (pr221 
                                             (pr1 F))
                                            h k) = 
?t2

          apply (square_id_left_v (C := D₁)).
        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
trb₂ transportb_square
       (id_left (id₁ (pr1 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))))
       (id_left (id₁ (pr1 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) z))))
       (pr1
          (functor_double_comp_cell (pr221 (pr1 F)) h
             k)) =
pr1 (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k)

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
trb₂ transportf_square
       (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))))
       (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) z))))
       (pr1
          (functor_double_comp_cell (pr221 (pr1 F)) h
             k)) =
pr1 (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k)

  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)

  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)

x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)

       (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))))
       (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) z))))
       (pr1
          (functor_double_comp_cell (pr221 (pr1 F)) h
             k)) = ?b
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
?b = pr1 (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k)

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
trb₂ transportf_square
       (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))))
       (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) z))))
       (pr1
          (functor_double_comp_cell (pr221 (pr1 F)) h
             k)) = ?b

          apply (transportf_f_square (C := D₁)).
        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
transportf_square
  (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))) @
   ! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
       (pr111 (pr1 F))
       (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       x)
  (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) z))) @
   ! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof0 (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
       (pr111 (pr1 F))
       (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       z)
  (pr1 (functor_double_comp_cell (pr221 (pr1 F)) h k)) =
pr1 (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k)

        apply transportf_square_id.
      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
transportb_square
  (id_v_left (τ x) @ ! id_v_right (τ x))
  (id_v_left (τ z) @ ! id_v_right (τ z))
  (double_transformation_hor_mor τ h
   ⋆h double_transformation_hor_mor τ k
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h
        (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) h k) =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths pr1
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (id_left (τ z,, θ z) @ ! id_right (τ z,, θ z)))
  (pr1
     (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x y h
      ⋆h pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           y z k ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k))
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
double_transformation_hor_mor τ h
⋆h double_transformation_hor_mor τ k
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h
     (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) h k =
pr1
  (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
     x y h
   ⋆h pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        y z k ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k)

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
lax_double_functor_comp_h
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) h k =
pr1 (lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k)

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
trb₂ (id_v_square
        (pr1 ((pr211 (pr1 G)) x y h)
         ·h pr1 ((pr211 (pr1 G)) y z k)) ;;2 pr1
                                               (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 (pr221 
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)) h
                                                 k)) =
pr1 (lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k)

                                               (functor_double_comp_cell
                                                 (pr221 
                                                 (pr1
                                                 G)) h

?b

C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
transportf_square
  (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 ((pr111 (pr1 G)) x))) @
   ! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
       (pr111 (pr1 G))
       (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       x)
  (! id_left (id₁ (pr1 ((pr111 (pr1 G)) z))) @
   ! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof0 (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
       (pr111 (pr1 G))
       (pr1_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       z)
  (pr1 (functor_double_comp_cell (pr221 (pr1 G)) h k)) =
pr1 (lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k)

        apply transportf_square_id.
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
pr2
  (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k
   ⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x z (h ·h k)) =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (id_left (τ z,, θ z) @ ! id_right (τ z,, θ z)))
  (pr2
     (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x y h
      ⋆h pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           y z k ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k))

h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
pr2
  (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k
   ⋆v pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x z (h ·h k)) =
lax_double_functor_comp_h
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) h k
⋆v double_transformation_hor_mor θ (h ·h k)

           y z k ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k))

C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
id_v_square
  (pr2 ((pr211 (pr1 F)) x y h)
   ·h pr2 ((pr211 (pr1 F)) y z k)) ;;2 pr2
                                         (functor_double_comp_cell
                                            (pr221 
                                             (pr1 F))
                                            h k) = 
?t2

          apply (square_id_left_v (C := D₂)).
        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
trb₂ transportb_square
       (id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))))
       (id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) z))))
       (pr2
          (functor_double_comp_cell (pr221 (pr1 F)) h
             k)) =
pr2 (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k)

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
trb₂ transportf_square
       (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))))
       (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) z))))
       (pr2
          (functor_double_comp_cell (pr221 (pr1 F)) h
             k)) =
pr2 (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k)

  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
trb₂ transportf_square
       (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))))
       (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) z))))
       (pr2
          (functor_double_comp_cell (pr221 (pr1 F)) h
             k)) = ?b
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
?b = pr2 (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k)

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
trb₂ transportf_square
       (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))))
       (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) z))))
       (pr2
          (functor_double_comp_cell (pr221 (pr1 F)) h
             k)) = ?b

          apply (transportf_f_square (C := D₂)).
        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
transportf_square
  (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) x))) @
   ! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
       (pr111 (pr1 F))
       (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       x)
  (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 F)) z))) @
   ! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof0 (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
       (pr111 (pr1 F))
       (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       z)
  (pr2 (functor_double_comp_cell (pr221 (pr1 F)) h k)) =
pr2 (lax_double_functor_comp_h F h k)

        apply transportf_square_id.
      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
transportb_square
  (id_v_left (θ x) @ ! id_v_right (θ x))
  (id_v_left (θ z) @ ! id_v_right (θ z))
  (double_transformation_hor_mor θ h
   ⋆h double_transformation_hor_mor θ k
   ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h
        (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) h k) =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (id_left (τ x,, θ x) @ ! id_right (τ x,, θ x)))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (id_left (τ z,, θ z) @ ! id_right (τ z,, θ z)))
  (pr2
     (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        x y h
      ⋆h pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
           y z k ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k))
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
double_transformation_hor_mor θ h
⋆h double_transformation_hor_mor θ k
⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h
     (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) h k =
pr2
  (pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
     x y h
   ⋆h pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans_data
        y z k ⋆v lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k)

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
lax_double_functor_comp_h
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) h k =
pr2 (lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k)

C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
trb₂ transportf_square
       (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 G)) x))))
       (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 G)) z))))
       (pr2
          (functor_double_comp_cell (pr221 (pr1 G)) h
             k)) = ?b

          apply (transportf_f_square (C := D₂)).
        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y, z: pr111 (pr1 C)
h: (pr121 (pr11 C)) x y
k: (pr121 (pr11 C)) y z
transportf_square
  (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 G)) x))) @
   ! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
       (pr111 (pr1 G))
       (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       x)
  (! id_left (id₁ (pr2 ((pr111 (pr1 G)) z))) @
   ! comp_hor_comp_data_subproof0 (pr111 (pr1 C))
       (category_binproduct (pr111 (pr1 D₁))
          (pr111 (pr1 D₂))) (pr111 (pr1 D₂))
       (pr111 (pr1 G))
       (pr2_functor (pr111 (pr1 D₁)) (pr111 (pr1 D₂)))
       z)
  (pr2 (functor_double_comp_cell (pr221 (pr1 G)) h k)) =
pr2 (lax_double_functor_comp_h G h k)

        apply transportf_square_id.
  Qed.

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)

  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
double_transformation F G

  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)

  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
twosided_disp_nat_trans ?τ ?τ
  (lax_double_functor_hor_mor F)
  (lax_double_functor_hor_mor G)

double_nat_trans_hor_id ?ττ

  (lax_double_functor_hor_id G)

  (lax_double_functor_hor_comp G)

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
F ⟹ G
 exact (prod_nat_trans τ θ).

F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)

θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
twosided_disp_nat_trans (prod_nat_trans τ θ)
  (prod_nat_trans τ θ) (lax_double_functor_hor_mor F)
  (lax_double_functor_hor_mor G)
 exact pair_double_transformation_twosided_disp_nat_trans.

 exact pair_double_transformation_hor_id.

▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ

F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)

C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
∏ x : C,
(pair_double_transformation
 ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) x = τ x
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
∏ (x y : C) (f : x -->h y),
double_transformation_hor_mor
  (pair_double_transformation
   ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) f =
transportb_square (?p x) (?p y)
  (double_transformation_hor_mor τ f)

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
∏ x : C,
(pair_double_transformation
 ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) x = τ x
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x: C
(pair_double_transformation
 ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) x = τ x

      apply idpath.
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
∏ (x y : C) (f : x -->h y),
double_transformation_hor_mor
  (pair_double_transformation
   ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) f =
transportb_square ((λ x0 : C, idpath (τ x0)) x)
  ((λ x0 : C, idpath (τ x0)) y)
  (double_transformation_hor_mor τ f)
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y: C
f: x -->h y
double_transformation_hor_mor
  (pair_double_transformation
   ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) f =
transportb_square ((λ x : C, idpath (τ x)) x)
  ((λ x : C, idpath (τ x)) y)
  (double_transformation_hor_mor τ f)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

   ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) f =

C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
x, y: C
f: x -->h y
double_transformation_hor_mor
  (pair_double_transformation
   ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) f =
transportb_square ((λ x : C, idpath (θ x)) x)
  ((λ x : C, idpath (θ x)) y)
  (double_transformation_hor_mor θ f)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)

  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
isaprop
  (∑ γ : F ==> G,
   γ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
   × γ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ)

p₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
p:= p₁ @ ! p₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂
γ₁ = γ₂

    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat

  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)

  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)

  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)

γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂
q:= q₁ @ ! q₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ =

C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
γ₁: F ==> G
p₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
γ₂: F ==> G
p₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
p:= p₁ @ ! p₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂
q:= q₁ @ ! q₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂
∏ (x y : C) (f : x -->h y),
double_transformation_hor_mor γ₁ f =
transportb_square (?p x) (?p y)
  (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ f)
