C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
γ₁: F ==> G
p₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
γ₂: F ==> G
p₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
p:= p₁ @ ! p₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂
q:= q₁ @ ! q₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂
x: C
pr1 (γ₁ x) = pr1 (γ₂ x)
 exact (double_transformation_eq_ob p x).
      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
γ₁: F ==> G
p₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
γ₂: F ==> G
p₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
p:= p₁ @ ! p₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂
q:= q₁ @ ! q₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂
x: C
pr2 (γ₁ x) = pr2 (γ₂ x)
 exact (double_transformation_eq_ob q x).
    
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
γ₁: F ==> G
p₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
γ₂: F ==> G
p₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
p:= p₁ @ ! p₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂
q:= q₁ @ ! q₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂
∏ (x y : C) (f : x -->h y),
double_transformation_hor_mor γ₁ f =
transportb_square
  ((λ x0 : C,
    dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F x0), pr1 (G x0) ⟧)
      (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F x0), pr2 (G x0) ⟧) (γ₁ x0) (γ₂ x0)
      (double_transformation_eq_ob p x0)
      (double_transformation_eq_ob q x0)) x)
  ((λ x0 : C,
    dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F x0), pr1 (G x0) ⟧)
      (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F x0), pr2 (G x0) ⟧) (γ₁ x0) (γ₂ x0)
      (double_transformation_eq_ob p x0)
      (double_transformation_eq_ob q x0)) y)
  (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ f)
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
γ₁: F ==> G
p₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
γ₂: F ==> G
p₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
p:= p₁ @ ! p₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂
q:= q₁ @ ! q₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
double_transformation_hor_mor γ₁ h =
transportb_square
  ((λ x : C,
    dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F x), pr1 (G x) ⟧)
      (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F x), pr2 (G x) ⟧) (γ₁ x) (γ₂ x)
      (double_transformation_eq_ob p x)
      (double_transformation_eq_ob q x)) x)
  ((λ x : C,
    dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F x), pr1 (G x) ⟧)
      (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F x), pr2 (G x) ⟧) (γ₁ x) (γ₂ x)
      (double_transformation_eq_ob p x)
      (double_transformation_eq_ob q x)) y)
  (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ h)

      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
γ₁: F ==> G
p₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
γ₂: F ==> G
p₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
p:= p₁ @ ! p₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂
q:= q₁ @ ! q₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
double_transformation_hor_mor γ₁ h =
transportb_square
  (maponpaths pr1
     (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F x), pr1 (G x) ⟧)
        (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F x), pr2 (G x) ⟧) (γ₁ x) (γ₂ x)
        (double_transformation_eq_ob p x)
        (double_transformation_eq_ob q x)))
  (maponpaths pr1
     (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F y), pr1 (G y) ⟧)
        (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F y), pr2 (G y) ⟧) (γ₁ y) (γ₂ y)
        (double_transformation_eq_ob p y)
        (double_transformation_eq_ob q y)))
  (pr1 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ h)),,
transportb_square
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F x), pr1 (G x) ⟧)
        (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F x), pr2 (G x) ⟧) (γ₁ x) (γ₂ x)
        (double_transformation_eq_ob p x)
        (double_transformation_eq_ob q x)))
  (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
     (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F y), pr1 (G y) ⟧)
        (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F y), pr2 (G y) ⟧) (γ₁ y) (γ₂ y)
        (double_transformation_eq_ob p y)
        (double_transformation_eq_ob q y)))
  (pr2 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ h))

      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
γ₁: F ==> G
p₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
γ₂: F ==> G
p₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
p:= p₁ @ ! p₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂
q:= q₁ @ ! q₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr1 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₁ h) =
pr1
  (transportb_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F x), pr1 (G x) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F x), pr2 (G x) ⟧) (γ₁ x) (γ₂ x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q x)))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F y), pr1 (G y) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F y), pr2 (G y) ⟧) (γ₁ y) (γ₂ y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q y)))
     (pr1 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ h)),,
   transportb_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F x), pr1 (G x) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F x), pr2 (G x) ⟧) (γ₁ x) (γ₂ x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q x)))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F y), pr1 (G y) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F y), pr2 (G y) ⟧) (γ₁ y) (γ₂ y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q y)))
     (pr2 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ h)))
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
γ₁: F ==> G
p₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
γ₂: F ==> G
p₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
p:= p₁ @ ! p₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂
q:= q₁ @ ! q₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr2 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₁ h) =
pr2
  (transportb_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F x), pr1 (G x) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F x), pr2 (G x) ⟧) (γ₁ x) (γ₂ x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q x)))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F y), pr1 (G y) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F y), pr2 (G y) ⟧) (γ₁ y) (γ₂ y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q y)))
     (pr1 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ h)),,
   transportb_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F x), pr1 (G x) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F x), pr2 (G x) ⟧) (γ₁ x) (γ₂ x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q x)))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F y), pr1 (G y) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F y), pr2 (G y) ⟧) (γ₁ y) (γ₂ y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q y)))
     (pr2 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ h)))

      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
γ₁: F ==> G
p₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
γ₂: F ==> G
p₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
p:= p₁ @ ! p₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂
q:= q₁ @ ! q₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr1 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₁ h) =
pr1
  (transportb_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F x), pr1 (G x) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F x), pr2 (G x) ⟧) (γ₁ x) (γ₂ x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q x)))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F y), pr1 (G y) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F y), pr2 (G y) ⟧) (γ₁ y) (γ₂ y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q y)))
     (pr1 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ h)),,
   transportb_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F x), pr1 (G x) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F x), pr2 (G x) ⟧) (γ₁ x) (γ₂ x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q x)))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F y), pr1 (G y) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F y), pr2 (G y) ⟧) (γ₁ y) (γ₂ y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q y)))
     (pr2 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ h)))
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
γ₁: F ==> G
p₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
γ₂: F ==> G
p₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
p:= p₁ @ ! p₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂
q:= q₁ @ ! q₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
transportb_square (double_transformation_eq_ob p x)
  (double_transformation_eq_ob p y)
  (double_transformation_hor_mor
     (γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) h) =
pr1
  (transportb_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F x), pr1 (G x) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F x), pr2 (G x) ⟧) (γ₁ x) (γ₂ x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q x)))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F y), pr1 (G y) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F y), pr2 (G y) ⟧) (γ₁ y) (γ₂ y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q y)))
     (pr1 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ h)),,
   transportb_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F x), pr1 (G x) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F x), pr2 (G x) ⟧) (γ₁ x) (γ₂ x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q x)))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F y), pr1 (G y) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F y), pr2 (G y) ⟧) (γ₁ y) (γ₂ y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q y)))
     (pr2 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ h)))

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
γ₁: F ==> G
p₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
γ₂: F ==> G
p₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
p:= p₁ @ ! p₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂
q:= q₁ @ ! q₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
double_transformation_hor_mor
  (γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂) h =
pr1 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ h)

        apply idpath.
      
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
γ₁: F ==> G
p₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
γ₂: F ==> G
p₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
p:= p₁ @ ! p₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂
q:= q₁ @ ! q₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
pr2 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₁ h) =
pr2
  (transportb_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F x), pr1 (G x) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F x), pr2 (G x) ⟧) (γ₁ x) (γ₂ x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q x)))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F y), pr1 (G y) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F y), pr2 (G y) ⟧) (γ₁ y) (γ₂ y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q y)))
     (pr1 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ h)),,
   transportb_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F x), pr1 (G x) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F x), pr2 (G x) ⟧) (γ₁ x) (γ₂ x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q x)))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F y), pr1 (G y) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F y), pr2 (G y) ⟧) (γ₁ y) (γ₂ y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q y)))
     (pr2 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ h)))
 
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
γ₁: F ==> G
p₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
γ₂: F ==> G
p₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
p:= p₁ @ ! p₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂
q:= q₁ @ ! q₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
transportb_square (double_transformation_eq_ob q x)
  (double_transformation_eq_ob q y)
  (double_transformation_hor_mor
     (γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) h) =
pr2
  (transportb_square
     (maponpaths pr1
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F x), pr1 (G x) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F x), pr2 (G x) ⟧) (γ₁ x) (γ₂ x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q x)))
     (maponpaths pr1
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F y), pr1 (G y) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F y), pr2 (G y) ⟧) (γ₁ y) (γ₂ y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q y)))
     (pr1 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ h)),,
   transportb_square
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F x), pr1 (G x) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F x), pr2 (G x) ⟧) (γ₁ x) (γ₂ x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p x)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q x)))
     (maponpaths dirprod_pr2
        (dirprodeq (D₁ ⟦ pr1 (F y), pr1 (G y) ⟧)
           (D₂ ⟦ pr2 (F y), pr2 (G y) ⟧) (γ₁ y) (γ₂ y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob p y)
           (double_transformation_eq_ob q y)))
     (pr2 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ h)))

        
C, D₁, D₂: univalent_double_cat
F, G: lax_double_functor C
  (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂)
τ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂)
θ: double_transformation
  (F · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
  (G · prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂)
γ₁: F ==> G
p₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₁: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
γ₂: F ==> G
p₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ = τ
q₂: γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ = θ
p:= p₁ @ ! p₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂
q:= q₁ @ ! q₂: γ₁ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂ =
γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂
x, y: C
h: x -->h y
double_transformation_hor_mor
  (γ₂ ▹ prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂) h =
pr2 (double_transformation_hor_mor γ₂ h)

        apply idpath.
  Qed.
End PairTransformation.

(** * 8. Products of double categories *)
Section BinProduct.
  Context (D₁ D₂ : bicat_of_double_cats).

  
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
binprod_cone D₁ D₂

  
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
binprod_cone D₁ D₂

    
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
bicat_of_double_cats
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
bicat_of_double_cats ⟦ ?p, D₁ ⟧
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
bicat_of_double_cats ⟦ ?p, D₂ ⟧

    
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
bicat_of_double_cats
 exact (prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂).
    
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
bicat_of_double_cats
⟦ prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂, D₁ ⟧
 exact (prod_univalent_double_cat_pr1 D₁ D₂).
    
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
bicat_of_double_cats
⟦ prod_univalent_double_cat D₁ D₂, D₂ ⟧
 exact (prod_univalent_double_cat_pr2 D₁ D₂).
  Defined.

  
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
binprod_ump_1 double_cat_binprod_cone

  
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
binprod_ump_1 double_cat_binprod_cone

    
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
q: binprod_cone D₁ D₂
binprod_1cell q double_cat_binprod_cone

    
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
q: binprod_cone D₁ D₂
bicat_of_double_cats ⟦ q, double_cat_binprod_cone ⟧
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
q: binprod_cone D₁ D₂
invertible_2cell
  (?φ · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 q)
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
q: binprod_cone D₁ D₂
invertible_2cell
  (?φ · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone)
  (binprod_cone_pr2 q)

    
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
q: binprod_cone D₁ D₂
bicat_of_double_cats ⟦ q, double_cat_binprod_cone ⟧
 exact (pair_lax_double_functor
               (binprod_cone_pr1 q)
               (binprod_cone_pr2 q)).
    
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
q: binprod_cone D₁ D₂
invertible_2cell
  (pair_lax_double_functor (binprod_cone_pr1 q)
     (binprod_cone_pr2 q)
   · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone)
  (binprod_cone_pr1 q)
 
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
q: binprod_cone D₁ D₂
pair_lax_double_functor (binprod_cone_pr1 q)
  (binprod_cone_pr2 q)
· binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
binprod_cone_pr1 q
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
q: binprod_cone D₁ D₂
is_invertible_2cell ?η

      
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
q: binprod_cone D₁ D₂
pair_lax_double_functor (binprod_cone_pr1 q)
  (binprod_cone_pr2 q)
· binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
binprod_cone_pr1 q
 apply pair_lax_double_functor_pr1.
      
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
q: binprod_cone D₁ D₂
is_invertible_2cell
  (pair_lax_double_functor_pr1 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)
     (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
 apply is_invertible_2cell_pair_lax_double_functor_pr1.
    
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
q: binprod_cone D₁ D₂
invertible_2cell
  (pair_lax_double_functor (binprod_cone_pr1 q)
     (binprod_cone_pr2 q)
   · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone)
  (binprod_cone_pr2 q)
 
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
q: binprod_cone D₁ D₂
pair_lax_double_functor (binprod_cone_pr1 q)
  (binprod_cone_pr2 q)
· binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
binprod_cone_pr2 q
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
q: binprod_cone D₁ D₂
is_invertible_2cell ?η

      
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
q: binprod_cone D₁ D₂
pair_lax_double_functor (binprod_cone_pr1 q)
  (binprod_cone_pr2 q)
· binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
binprod_cone_pr2 q
 apply pair_lax_double_functor_pr2.
      
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
q: binprod_cone D₁ D₂
is_invertible_2cell
  (pair_lax_double_functor_pr2 (binprod_cone_pr1 q)
     (binprod_cone_pr2 q))
 apply is_invertible_2cell_pair_lax_double_functor_pr2.
  Defined.

  
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
binprod_ump_2 double_cat_binprod_cone

  
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
binprod_ump_2 double_cat_binprod_cone

    
D₁, D₂, C: bicat_of_double_cats
F, G: bicat_of_double_cats ⟦ C, double_cat_binprod_cone
⟧
τ: F · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone
θ: F · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone
∃! γ : F ==> G,
γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone = τ
× γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone = θ

    
D₁, D₂, C: bicat_of_double_cats
F, G: bicat_of_double_cats ⟦ C, double_cat_binprod_cone
⟧
τ: F · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone
θ: F · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone
isaprop
  (∑ γ : F ==> G,
   γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone = τ
   × γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone = θ)
D₁, D₂, C: bicat_of_double_cats
F, G: bicat_of_double_cats ⟦ C, double_cat_binprod_cone
⟧
τ: F · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone
θ: F · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone
∑ γ : F ==> G,
γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone = τ
× γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone = θ

    
D₁, D₂, C: bicat_of_double_cats
F, G: bicat_of_double_cats ⟦ C, double_cat_binprod_cone
⟧
τ: F · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone
θ: F · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone
isaprop
  (∑ γ : F ==> G,
   γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone = τ
   × γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone = θ)
 exact (pair_double_transformation_unique τ θ).
    
D₁, D₂, C: bicat_of_double_cats
F, G: bicat_of_double_cats ⟦ C, double_cat_binprod_cone
⟧
τ: F · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone
θ: F · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone
∑ γ : F ==> G,
γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone = τ
× γ ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone = θ
 
D₁, D₂, C: bicat_of_double_cats
F, G: bicat_of_double_cats ⟦ C, double_cat_binprod_cone
⟧
τ: F · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone
θ: F · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone
F ==> G
D₁, D₂, C: bicat_of_double_cats
F, G: bicat_of_double_cats ⟦ C, double_cat_binprod_cone
⟧
τ: F · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone
θ: F · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone
?pr1 ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone = τ
D₁, D₂, C: bicat_of_double_cats
F, G: bicat_of_double_cats ⟦ C, double_cat_binprod_cone
⟧
τ: F · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone
θ: F · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone
(λ _ : ?pr1 ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone =
       τ,
 ?pr1 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone = θ)
  ?pr10

      
D₁, D₂, C: bicat_of_double_cats
F, G: bicat_of_double_cats ⟦ C, double_cat_binprod_cone
⟧
τ: F · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone
θ: F · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone
F ==> G
 exact (pair_double_transformation τ θ).
      
D₁, D₂, C: bicat_of_double_cats
F, G: bicat_of_double_cats ⟦ C, double_cat_binprod_cone
⟧
τ: F · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone
θ: F · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone
pair_double_transformation τ θ
▹ binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone = τ
 exact (pair_double_transformation_pr1 τ θ).
      
D₁, D₂, C: bicat_of_double_cats
F, G: bicat_of_double_cats ⟦ C, double_cat_binprod_cone
⟧
τ: F · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone
θ: F · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone ==>
G · binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone
(λ _ : pair_double_transformation τ θ
       ▹ binprod_cone_pr1 double_cat_binprod_cone = τ,
 pair_double_transformation τ θ
 ▹ binprod_cone_pr2 double_cat_binprod_cone = θ)
  (pair_double_transformation_pr1 τ θ)
 exact (pair_double_transformation_pr2 τ θ).
  Defined.

  
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
has_binprod_ump double_cat_binprod_cone

  
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
has_binprod_ump double_cat_binprod_cone

    
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
binprod_ump_1 double_cat_binprod_cone
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
binprod_ump_2 double_cat_binprod_cone

    
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
binprod_ump_1 double_cat_binprod_cone
 exact double_cat_binprod_ump_1.
    
D₁, D₂: bicat_of_double_cats
binprod_ump_2 double_cat_binprod_cone
 exact double_cat_binprod_ump_2.
  Defined.
End BinProduct.

Definition has_binprod_bicat_of_double_cat
  : has_binprod bicat_of_double_cats
  := λ D₁ D₂,
     double_cat_binprod_cone D₁ D₂
     ,,
     double_cat_binprod_ump D₁ D₂.
